Biological definition in english: Any non living factor that impacts an ecosystem. For example, temperature.
Defintion in Diné: Ááhoo'nííł éí bee hahodilyaii t'áá ałtso nahasdzáán dóó yádiłhił bii' siláhígíí ahił nidaalnishgo nináháhááhígíí éí nayiił'ná hadoh dóó hak'az ádaat'éii.
Literal Translation: ááhoo'níił = interacting systems/systems; nayiiłnání=those things which give energy and movement. Systems, those factors, which moves them:
Use in a sentence (English): Plant growth can be affected by abiotic factors like sunlight, water, and temperature.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nanise' nooséełgo binaagóó ha'át'ííshį́į́ doo hináa dago hólónígíí shánídíín, tó, dóó hado dóó hak'az ádaat'éii bik'ehgo noosééł.

Biological definition in english: A system used to group human blood into different types, based on the presence or absence of certain characteristics on the surface of red blood cells. The four main blood types are A, B, O, and AB
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii bidił bee bééhózindooígíí ádaalyaa. Hadił łichíí'ígíí bikáá'gónaa áhoot'éhígíí bik'ehgo háidígííshį́į́ hadił A, B, O, doodago AB.
Literal Translation: dił = blood; ał'ąą = different kinds; ádaat'éhígíí = the way they are blood different kinds the way they are
Use in a sentence (English): If you have surgery, it is important to know your blood type. If you lose a lot of blood, doctors find a match for your ABO blood type so that your body accepts the donated blood.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Naho'dilgizhgo dił łą́ hats'ánah éí bąą hadił nilínígíí hoł bééhózin aláahgo. Dił łą hąąh haanahgo azee' ííł'íní dił háidígííshį́į́ hadił nilínígíí bił aheełt'é A, B, O díí táá' ał'ąą át'é éí bik'ehgo dił yee adahajeehígíí bidił hwiih nákááh.

Diné word: atsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago bi'oh ábóodziil
Biological definition in english: A substance that becomes more positively or negatively charged during a chemical reaction and releases hydrogen ions (protons) when dissolved in water.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da bitsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago a'oh yileehgo taah ji'áahgo níłch'i hydrogen bitsiniltł'ish hólǫ́ǫgo bits'á shígish.
Literal Translation: atsiniltł'ish = electricity/electrical charge (lightning); bilááh = over/excess; éí doodago = or; bi'oh ábóodziil = less in strength electrical charge excess or less in strength
Use in a sentence (English): An acid - like lemon juice or  vinegar - is useful in a marinade because it breaks down the tissue and allows flavor and oil to enter.
Use in a sentence (Diné): T'áádoole'é néídił'eełii acid wolyéhígíí ch'il łitsooí yázhí, lemon, bitoo' éí doodago vinegar ch'iyáán biih nídaa'niłgo nídaalzhoh áko bee halniihí dóó ak'ah da biníshiigéésh.

Biological definition in english: A heritable trait that increases the fitness of an individual with that trait compared to individuals without that trait in a particular environment.
Defintion in Diné: Bee ájít'éii bił ho'dizhchínígíí ła' bee hadziilgo jiinánígíí hái da nááná ła' ákót'éhígíí doo bił yizhchínígíí bił ałch'į' naa'nil aheełt'éego haz'ą́ągi haalzííd.
Literal Translation: bił = with that which; ho'dizhchíinii = one is born; bee = by means of it; jíłdzilígíí = one is stable/withstands. characteristic with which one is born by means of it one is stable and withstands
Use in a sentence (English): The Jackrabbit's large ears are an adaptation that helps them hear better and stay cool in the hot desert.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Gahtsoh bijaa' danineez silį́į́'ígíí éí yee nízaadgóó ayóo adiits'a' dóó deesdoigo yee doo bił niiłdóoh da.

Biological definition in english: An organism that has reached sexual maturity.
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii oochííł yaa ninísą́ągo yaa hóyánígíí.
Literal Translation: hináanii = living things; oochííł = reproductive ability/reproduction; yaa = reaching it; ninísą́ = grew to it. living thing developing the ability to reproduce.
Use in a sentence (English): A cat is an adult once it can have kittens.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Másítsa'ii éí t'áá biyázhí haleehé másí t'áá hóyáanii yileeh.

Biological definition in english: The art, science, or practice of cultivating the soil, growing crops, and raising livestock
Defintion in Diné: Dá'ák'eh, k'eelyéí, daneest'áanii, dóó iiná naalyé bíhoo'ą́ą́'
Literal Translation: kʼééʼdílyééh= planting/agriculture
Distinction: this applies to all types of vegetation. Word will change If start talking about specific planting of something ie "plant corn, kil dilyeeh"
Use in a sentence (English): Successful agriculture depends on farmers knowing the right time of year to plant their seeds, the correct soil, and how much water their plants need to grow.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Dá'ák'eh bee iiná bíighahgo ádeeł'ínínígíí éí k'e'dilyé baa dahwiilzhíísh bił béédahózin, łeezh bii' yá'át'éehgo na'nise', dóó tó bee baa áháyą́ bił béédahózin.

Biological definition in english: Unicellular or multicellular organisms occurring in fresh or salt water or moist ground, that have chlorophyll and other pigments but lack true stems, roots, and leaves
Defintion in Diné: Tátł'id éí táyi' éí doodago hoditłéé'góó dahólǫ́ bits'íís bitł'óól t'áá łá'í éí doodago łą́ áádóó dootł'izh łeh éí doodago t'áá łahgo ánoolnin łeh.
Literal Translation: tłʼid=murky appearance; tá= under or within water. under water murky substance.
Use in a sentence (English): Algae can grow as single cells or large green clumps and sometimes appear to cover the entire water surface if enough of them grow. They are similar to plants because they also use the sun to make their own food.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Tátł'id bihiináhts'óóz t'ááłá'ígo nidi danéesé éí doodago łą́ągo dahnaaztłée' yileeh dóó táłkáá' dahnidaa'eeł, łą́ danéeséego tó bikáá'go bik'íiltih. T'áá chil nanise' yił aheełt'é háálá shá yee naalnishgo bich'iiyą' ííł'į́.

Biological definition in english: A particular version of a gene.
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíił'ii łahgo át'éhígíí.
Literal Translation: gene that has become different or changed
Use in a sentence (English): You have two copies of each gene in your genome.  If the copies are different, you have two alleles of that gene.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hats'íís biyi'di bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii bee hahodít'é éí biyi'di bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii béé'ályaago naakigo bii' hólǫ́. Béé'ályaaígíí doo aheełt'ée dago éí alleles, bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łahgo ádzaaígíí, naakigo hwee hólǫ́ǫ doo.

Biological definition in english: The building block of protein. There are ą) amino acides, and each is specified by a DNA segment of three nucleotides (bases).
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bee haleehii  naadiin ał'ąą ánéelt'e' éí ats'íís bitł'óól yee naalnishgo bee ats'íís hodooleeł dóó áadi hasht'éé yoodlííł.  Iiná bitł'óól, DNA, bee bóhólnííh éí bik'ehgo náás oochíiiłii táa'go bita'góó daníjaa'.
Literal Translation: ats'íís=the body; bee=by means of which; nihwiileehii=it becomes an physical entity (this phrase refers to protein); bizhool=fine primal substance. That substance that exists to form a protein.
Use in a sentence (English): Different kinds of amino acids create proteins of many shapes and functions, just as different kinds of building materials can be used to make anything from a castle to a school to a shed.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ak'ah bineestiin, amino acid, éí ch'iyáán ats'íís yee nanise' dóó háidoodlííł, protein t'áá ał'ąą ádaat'éego dóó ał'ąą ádaat'éego nidaalnishgo bits'ą́ą́dóó nihwiileeh, kin nidaa'nilígíí nahalin éí bee ádoolnííłígíí t'óó ahayóí ał'ąą át'éego choo'į́įgo bee kin ał'ąą ádaat'éhígíí, castle da, ólta' da, doodago hééł bighan da ádaal'į́.

Biological definition in english: A vertebrate animal whose internal temperature depends on the environment (ectotherm). Most live in the water when young and live on land as adults. Examples include frogs, toads, and salamanders.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii bíígháán dahólónígíí  éí binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí binahjį' bits'íís sidoh dóó sik'azígíí éí (ectotherm wolyé). Yichííhgo táyi' naaleeh áádóó dahdínísééh dóó éí dóó  tábąąhdi dóó łeeshtahdi dahiná. Ch'ał ádaat'éii  dóó salamanders ááł ha'ní.
Literal Translation: Tátłááh= under water; dóó = and; nihookáá = on land; naaldeehii = living and going about In the water and on the ground those that live there
Use in a sentence (English): Frogs are amphibians that live as tadpoles in the water when they are young, and are able to walk on land as an adult after they grow legs.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Chał éí táyi' dóó nihookáá' hinánígíí ádaat'é, chałyázhí danilį́įgo éí táyi' dahiná dóó ałtso niniséehgo éí bijáád dahaleehgo nihookáá' naaldeeh.

Biological definition in english: To study or examine something in detail, in order to discover more about it
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ baa ajółta' éí doodago jinéł'į́įgo nijiłkaah t'áá nináníłtsojį' éí bee béézhdi'dootį́į́ł biniyé.
Literal Translation: Things the way they are and to the extent they exist they are studied
Use in a sentence (English): When you are confused about an object or idea and you want to know how it works, you will analyze it to better understand it.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ha'át'íi da baa nitsíníkeesgo da níníł'į́įgo da t'áá nił naaki nilį́įgo, nił haa dago da naalnishígi át'éego shił bééhodoozįįł nínízingo éí hazhó'ó baa nitsíníkees dóó naniłkaahgo hazhó'ó bik'i' di'díítį́į́ł.

Biological definition in english: The stage of cell division in mitosis or meiosis in which the doubled set of chromosomes separates into two identical groups that move to opposite ends of the cell
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á níséego iiná bitł'óól (DNA) bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii biyi'di naaki ałch'į' naazlá, éí t'áá ahedaałt'éego ałts'ákah dóó ahidiníł náádę́ę́' niikah áádóó ałts'á nísééh.
Literal Translation: chromosomes move to opposite sides (in a cell)
Use in a sentence (Diné): cancer wolyéhígíí éí hats'íístahdi hinááh ts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól tídíl'įįhgo ba'át'e' haleeh dóó dahdíníisééh.

Biological definition in english: One from whom an individual is descended, whether on the father's or mother's side, at any number of generations.
Defintion in Diné: Hak'éí nát'ą́ą́' ahool'áago hamá dóó hazhé'é dabishchíníinii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' hojizhlį́į́'ígíí
Literal Translation: azází = generations of relatives who preceded you
Use in a sentence (English): Your grandfather, great-grandmother, and great-great grandmother are all your ancestors.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ninálí hastįįh, nichei, nichó dabichó/dabinálí asdzą́ą́h dóó naakidi nichó/ninálí asdzą́ą́h éí t'áá ałtso nité'ázini ádaat'é.

Literal Translation: ánaasází = bygone ancestors; people no longer in existence
Use in a sentence (Diné): Bíla'ashdla'ii ałk'idą́ą́' naasdee' nít'ę́ę́'yę́ę bits'iil ba'át'e' dahólǫ́ kints'iil dahdaask'idgóó naazjaa'.

Biological definition in english: A large group of multicellular eukaryotic organisms.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'íís bitł'óól (cells) daholónígíí biyi'di bijéí (nucleus) iiná bitł'óól dóó bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii nídahineeshzhee'.
Literal Translation: naaldeehii = living things that move about
Use in a sentence (English): People, butterflies, fish, and cats are all examples of animals.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Bíla'ashdla'ii, k'aalógii, łóó' dóó másí éí t'áá ałtso hináanii ayánígíí, yee ákonízinii dóó bits'óóz dahólónígíí, dóó tsxį́įłgo naha'nánígíí ádaat'éego animals bee wójí.

Literal Translation: naaldlooshii = living things that trot or walk

Biological definition in english: A substance that kills or inhibits the growth of bacteria.
Defintion in Diné: Ch'osh doo yit'íinii bee yigání éí doodago bee ni'óolziní
Literal Translation: ch'osh=bug, bacteria; doo yit'íinii=not visible; bee naatseedí=substance used to kill them. A substance used to kill bacteria.
Use in a sentence (English): When harmful bacteria make you sick, the doctor may give you antibiotics to get rid of the bacteria.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ch'osh doo yit'íinii ba'át'e' hólónígíí bits'ą́ą́dóó hatah doo hats'íi da jileehgo azee'ííł'íní azee' ch'osh doo yit'íinii neiłtseedígíí hąąh áyiił'įįh éí ch'osh doo yit'íinii ííłdįįh.

Biological definition in english: A protein produced by the body's immune system when it detects harmful substances. The plural of antibody is antibodies.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bee doo bihodééłníinii ats'íís hasht'éé yoodlíiłii (protein) áyiił'įįh ats'íís atíidoolíłii yaa ákoniizįįhgo
Literal Translation: ats'íís=the body; bee=that by means of it; doo bihodééłníinii=it is protected from harm. That which protects the body; That which shields the body.
Use in a sentence (English): Antibodies are used by your body to defend itself against things like viruses, bacteria, or even cancer cells that may cause you harm.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hats'íís bee doo bihodééł'níinii hats'íís ííł'ínígíí yee ách'ą́ą́h naalnish. Naałniih virus, ch'osh doo yit'íinii éí doodago hinááhts'óóz/hats'íís bitł'óól ba'át'e' hazlį́įgo dahdíníisánígíí atíhodoolííłígíí yich'ą́ą́h naalnish.

Diné word: biką' dóó bi'áadii t'áá gééd oochííł
Biological definition in english: The process of creating offspring without exchanging genetic information with another organism through sex.
Defintion in Diné: Azhé'é t'áágééd i'niitsąąh dóó ni'iichííh. Amá t'áá sáhá idínóoltsąął dóó adoołchííł.
Literal Translation: biką'=the male; dóó=and; bi'áadii=the female; t'áá gééd=just without that (their role); oochííł=offsprings are born. The process of creating offsprings without sexual activity of males and females.
Use in a sentence (English): A bacteria cell can make a copy of itself by splitting into two cells.  When something reproduces without a partner, it is called asexual reproduction.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ch'osh doo yit'íinii bihinááhts'óóz'/bits'íís bitł'óól ałts'áníséehgo ádéé'iil'įįh, naaki yiłchííh. Hináanii t'áá sáhá t'áá bí ałchíihgo éí asexual reproduction wolyé.

Biological definition in english: The smallest component of an element having the chemical properties of the element, consisting of a nucleus containing combinations of neutrons and protons and one or more electrons
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ bee ályaii t'ááłá'í si'ą́ągo, atom wolyé, bijéí hólǫ́, bijéí biyi'di proton biniltł'ish shábik'ehgo bii' silá éí positive deiłní dóó neutron bitsiniltł'ish bąą ádin ákondi yee óchíidii, béésh ná'iiláhá nahalingo bii' hólǫ́. Atom bijéí bii' siléí
Literal Translation: T'áá ałtson7=everything; bineestiin/bizhool=its fine mist and particles
Use in a sentence (English): All matter is made up of atoms just as a crowd is made up of people. Matter can be composed of different types of atoms, or elements, just like the people in a crowd can be men or women, old or young, and short or tall.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Matter éí t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ áłníłdáás, áníłtso, áłts'íísídóó nitsaajį', éí atoms ał'ąą ádaat'éhígíí dóó níláhgóó dahólónígíí bee ádaalyaa. Hasłą́ą éí bíla'ashdla'ii áłah silį́į'go bichá sizhóód doo ał'ąą ádaníłtso, asdzání dóó hastóí, dóó ániid naagháii dóó náás silį́į'ii da'atah doo.

Biological definition in english: Principal molecule for storing and transferring energy in cells.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di t'áádoole'é si'ą́ągo ats'íís bitł'óól yee biinéí dooígíí bii' nihwiileeh dóó náásgóó ííł'į́
Literal Translation: ats'íís bitł'óól = cell, biziil = energy. Meaning, cell's energy
Use in a sentence (English): Cells use the food you eat to make  adenosine triphosphate, which  stores chemical energy that can be used  to do work like move molecules or grow.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól hats'íís yee hadít'éhígíí ch'iyáán jiyánígíí yee hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól yee biziil ííł'ínígíí, adenosine triphosphate, yee biinéígo hats'íís noosééł dóó yee naha'ná.

Biological definition in english: Occurs when the body's immune system attacks and destroys healthy body tissue by mistake
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís iisiihgo ádík'ijį' naalnish yileehgo ats'íís doo bąąhtééh da yę́ę niyiiłchxǫǫh yileeh
Literal Translation: the body toward its self it directs self defense as disease
Use in a sentence (English): Sometimes your body's immune system mistakes your own cells as pathogens, this can cause autoimmune disease.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Łah da hats'íís yee doo bihodééłníinii, immune system, hats'íístahdi hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól yínól'ah, t'áádoole'é ba'át'e' dahólǫ́ǫgo ats'íís yihodiiłt'ihii át'é nízingo yik'ijį' nídiilnish. Ákót'įįhgo hats'íís yąąh dahooł'aah, autoimmune disease deiłní.

Biological definition in english: An organism capable of making its own food from inorganic substances using light or chemical energy (compare with heterotroph)
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii t'áá bí ch'iyáán yidooyį́į́łígíí ííł' į́ t'áá ákǫ́ǫ́h binaagóó hólónígíí adinídíín dóó t'áádoole'é ałtah nihwiileehgo ahił nidaalnishígíí bits'ą́ą́ biziil choyooł'į́įgo
Literal Translation: one that creates its own nutrients
Use in a sentence (English): You've never seen pine trees eat food because they are autotrophs and use light, water, and carbon dioxide to gain energy.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nídíshchíí' ch'iyáán yiyą́ągo doo yiiltséeh da. Éidí éí shánídíín, tó, dóó níłch'i carbon dioxide wolyéhígíí choyooł'į́įgo yee biinéí. Kódaat'éhígíí éí autotrophs wolyé.

Biological definition in english: Microscopic single celled organisms.
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é bits'íís bitł'óól t'ááłá'ígo yee hiná ch'osh doo yit'íinii dabijiní
Literal Translation: chʼosh=bug, doo yitʼínii= you can't see.
Use in a sentence (English): Even if your hands look clean it is important that you wash them to remove any harmful bacteria.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Níla' níníł'į́įgo doo bąąh chiní dashį́į́ nahalin. Tánínánígisgo ch'osh doo yit'íinii doo níla' bee dii chin da.

Biological definition in english: A substance that becomes more positively or negatively charged during a chemical reaction and accepts hydrogen ions when dissolved in water.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da náádaa łahdę́ę́' ha'át'íi da bił ahiih yilyéehgo bitsiniltł'ish bilááh éí doodago a'oh yileeh  taah ji'áahgo níłch'i hydrogen bitsiniltł'ish náyiilááh
Literal Translation: essential substance for creation of the physical body
Use in a sentence (English): Many toothpastes include a base like baking soda as an ingredient because it can prevent bacteria from growing in your mouth.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Awoo' bił yich'iishí ádaalne'go bił é'él'íní, baking soda, íiyisíí binahjį' ádeił'į́ háálá éí hazéé'góne' ch'osh doo yit'íinii neiłtseedgo doo danéesée da.

Biological definition in english: Two nucleotides (also known as bases) that combine and join to make DNA. Base A combines with T and base G combines with C.
Defintion in Diné: Bee iiná hodooleełii nucleotide naakigo ahidii'ash éí ats'íís bitł'óól DNA yileeh
Literal Translation: that which becomes a body/person that face one another
Use in a sentence (English): DNA is shaped like a spiral staircase.  Like pieces of a puzzle, only certain base pairs can fit together to make the steps of the staircase.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Iiná bitł'óól, DNA, haaz'éí bee hááda'aldahá nahalingo ałk'ééłgis. T'áádoole'é ahiihe'níiłgo bee na'ach'ąąhí nahalingo bee iiná haleehii, base pairs, bee áhodoonííłígíí iiná bitł'óól bita'góne' ahidadidoolyééłígíí bibeehaz'áanii bik'ehgo ahinidééh.

Biological definition in english: How an organism acts
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii áát'įįłígíí
Literal Translation: the way a living thing acts, behaves
Use in a sentence (English): A spider building a web, a dog wagging its tail, or a bird calling for a mate are all examples of these organism's behavior.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Na'ashjé'ii na'atł'o, łííchaaí bitsee' kwííł'į́, éí doodago ayáásh bich'ooní yíká ání, kót'éego dahináanii naaldeehígíí dóó ádaat'įįłígíí éí biniyéii dahólǫ́ǫgo ádaat'į́, éí ááh ha'ní behavior.

Biological definition in english: In organisms, chemical reactions that help sustain life and allow cells to grow
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'íístahdi t'áá ałtso ahił nidaalnishgo yee hiná dóó bits'íís bitł'óól hazhó'ó danéesé
Literal Translation: by means of life they are in process
Use in a sentence (English): When you eat food, your body converts it into energy through a biochemical reaction called metabolism.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ch'iyáán yíníyą́ą'go nits'íís éí yee biinéí dooleełígíí yee íidoolííł. Hináanii bits'íís bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ ahił nidaalnishgo bee iinánígíí bee iinéí niheleeh, metabolism éí doodago biochemical reaction deiłní ałdó'.

Biological definition in english: The variety of life and its processes, including the variety of living organisms, the genetic differences among them, and the communities and ecosystems in which they occur
Defintion in Diné: Iiná ał'ąą ádaat'éego bits'ą́ą́dóó ayoonaałígíí éí díí dahináanii t'áá ałtso, bik'ehgo yee oołchíiłii dóó naaldeehgo bá nahaz'áą́góó dóó hózhǫ́ǫgo bá dahoo'a'gi
Literal Translation: where different forms of living things exist
Use in a sentence (English): The biodiversity in a desert includes the cacti, bats, lizards, hummingbirds, and beetles that live there.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Halgai di iiná ałtaas'éí, biodiversity, éí hosh, jaa' abaní, na'ashǫ́'iiłbáhá, dahyiitį́hí, dóó ch'osh ahił naaldeehgo bee hózhǫ́ǫgo nahaz'ą́.

Biological definition in english: The cycle in which nitrogen, carbon, and other inorganic elements of the environment are converted into the organic substances of animals or plants and released back into the environment
Defintion in Diné: Níłch'i nitrogen, t'eesh carbon dóó t'áádoole'é doo dahináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' dahólónígíí inorganic substances bił ááhoo'níiłgo bił hoogáałígíí hináanii nídanidlį́ dóó nahasdzáán bikáá'góó ał'ąą nídadilzhish
Literal Translation: earth sustains and regenerates life
Use in a sentence (English): The water cycle is a biogeochemical cycle that describes the way water moves around the Earth.  It includes clouds forming, rain falling, plants absorbing water from the soil, and water evaporating from rivers and lakes.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Tó náhoodleełgo nahasdzáán yee hadít'éii' dóó dahináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' ahił nidaalnishgo nahasdzáán bikáá'góó tó náhoodleełgo ádayósin. K'os dahaleeh, aho'niiłtį́į́h, ch'il nanise tó bitahgóó dahaleeh, tó hót'ááh dahidishegéésh.

Biological definition in english: The scientific study of life and living organisms
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii t'áá ałtso baa nahodigį'go naalkaah
Literal Translation: iiná=life, naalkaah= study. means to study life.
Use in a sentence (English): In biology class, you learn how all of life functions and changes over time, from the smallest celled organisms to vast ecosystems.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Iiná naalkaah dóó bíhoo'aahgóne', ayoonaał dóó ał'ąą anídaa'nííłgo nídahodilzhish éí bíhoo'aah, hinááhts'óóz danilį́įgo dahináádę́ę́' dóó t'áá át'éé nít'ę́ę́' iiná bee ááhoo'níiłgo hoogááłígíí.

Biological definition in english: A regional or global land area that is characterized by the plants, animals and climate in that area
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáagi haashį́į́ honíłtso haz'ą́ągo nanise' dóó naaldeehii bá yá'áhoot'éehgo bił hoolzhish
Literal Translation: a place where it is good for and life is sustainable
Use in a sentence (English): A desert is a biome that has plants and animals that live successfully with little or no rainfall.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Halgai di haz'ą́ągo éí t'áá sahdii át'éego iiná hólǫ́. Nanise' ałtaas'éí dóó hináanii naaldeehii nizhónígo naaldeeh níłtsą́ t'įįhdígo nidi yee éí doodago t'áágééd nidi.

Biological definition in english: The thin zone surrounding Earth where all life exists
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó áhoołts'óózígo honít'i'go iiná bináhaazlá
Literal Translation: a place where it is prepared for living things
Use in a sentence (English): The biosphere includes all of the places on Earth where organisms can live.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Iiná bee hahodít'éégóó éí nahasdzáán bikáá'góó hináanii bá nahaz'ą́ą́góó kéédahat'į́.

Biological definition in english: Any living thing that has an effect on another organism, population, community, or ecosystem
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó hináanii kéédahat'į́įgo bił nahaz'ánígíí hináanii t'áá át'é yiłdi'ígíí
Literal Translation: organisms that work together or affect one another
Use in a sentence (English): Plant growth can be affected by biotic factors like herbivores and pathogens.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nanise' nooséełgo hináago naaleehii ch'il deiyánígíí, herbivores, dóó bits'ą́ą́dóó naałniih atída'ał'íinii, pathogens, beinít'įįhgo noosééł yę́ę yiníłtł'a doo.

Biological definition in english: The number of total live births in comparison to the total population size in a specified community or area over a specified period of time
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii kééhat'į́įgi t'áá hoolzhishgóne' t'áá át'é yéélta'go dóó éí hoolzhishígíí haashį́į́ néelą́ą́' ániid náádaazhchínígíí yéélta'go ałhąą naa'nil.
Literal Translation: birthing that are counted
Use in a sentence (English): If 20 calves are born on a farm with 100 total cows, then we could say that 0.2 calves are born for every cow on the farm (20 calves / 100 cows = 0.2 calves per cow).
Use in a sentence (Diné): Dá'ák'eh bikáa'gi neeznádiin béégashiits'a'ii béégashiiyáázh naadiin deishchį́. Áko á'nídadii'níi doo, béégashiiyáázh daazhchínígíí béégashiitsa'ii bik'eh nít'į́įgo wólta'go éí t'ááłá'í sizį́ t'áá bich'į'di, ó.ąó bíighahgo deishchį́į doo dá'ákehdi. (Naadiin béégashiiyáázh yizhchínígíí / neeznádiin béégashiitsa'ii bik'eh nítį́įgo éí ó.ąó bíighahgo nidahaazhchį́į doo)

Biological definition in english: Body fluid in humans and other animals that delivers necessary substances such as nutrients and oxygen to the cells and transports waste away those cells
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii bits'íístoo' dóó hináago naaldeehii bits'íístoo' bits'íístahgóó dóó bits'íís bitł'óól biyi'góó níłch'i dóó ch'iyáán dóó yee hináanii ayiił'eeł áádóó ats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdii níláhgóó ats'á yiile
Literal Translation: blood
Use in a sentence (English): Your body will stop functioning if it loses too much blood, because blood contains the oxygen and nutrients your body needs.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nits'íís doo naalnish da doo dił t'óó ahayóí bąąh háágo'go, háálá dił níłch'i bii' hólǫ́ dóó ch'iyáán bibee adziil dóó iináanii nits'íís yee naha'ná éí yinízin.

Biological definition in english: The scientific study of plants
Defintion in Diné: Chil dóó nanise' ał'ąą ádaat'éii naalkaah
Literal Translation: all forms of plants studied
Use in a sentence (English): You are studying botany when you learn about how plants function, grow, and reproduce.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nanise' ałtaas'éí, botany, bíhojiił'aahgo éí ch'Il dóó nanise' ádaat'éí nidaalnish, nidanise' dóó háádahiniséhígíí bíhojiił'aah.

Biological definition in english: The organ in the body which controls the functions of the body, interprets and stores information, and affects intelligence and emotion.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bii' siléí ats'íís t'áá át'é naalnishgo áyósin, ádahoot'éii t'áá ałtso yaa ákonízin dóó yénálniih, dóó bik'izhdiitáanii baa nitsídzíkees dóó háni' nilíinii yiyoołnaał
Literal Translation: ghąąʼ= matter (brain); atsii= heads. So the "matter or brain in your head"
Use in a sentence (English): Your brain gives you the ability to think, speak, move, and remember.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nitsiighąą' éí bee nitsíníkees, yáníłti', nahí'ná, dóó éénílniih.

Biological definition in english: When organisms disguise their appearance to blend in with their surroundings
Defintion in Diné: Hináago naaldeeh dóó nidaat'a'ii binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí yee hadiit'įįhgo doo yit'į́į da yileeh
Literal Translation: by means of that which one is not seen
Use in a sentence (English): Jackrabbits are brown so that they camouflage with the dirt and avoid being seen by predators.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Gahtsoh éí dadiniltso áko łeezh yedaałt'éego bił nidoodiłígíí doo boo'į́į da.

Biological definition in english: An important nutrient used as energy by the body and made mostly of sugars
Defintion in Diné: Ch'iyáán íiyisíí bee ats'íís bidziil dóó biinéí áyósinígíí. Łikání t'éí át'é.
Use in a sentence (English): Your body can use the carbohydrates  in foods like bread and potatoes  as sources of energy.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nits'íís éí ch'iyáán t'áádoo hodina'í náálkąąłígíí, carboydrates, łees'áán dóó nímasii ádaat'éii choyooł'į́įgo yee bidziil dóó biinéí.

Biological definition in english: The movement of carbon dioxide between the atmosphere, living organisms, and land and acquatic ecosystems.
Defintion in Diné: Níłch'I carbon dioxide wolyéhígíí hót'ááhgóó dóó níłch'I bitahgóó, dahináanii bitahgóó dóó táyi'góó hoo'nááłgo ahééhwiilzhíísh
Literal Translation: níłch'i=air(gaseous substance); carbon=t'eesh(remains of oxidation or burning of organic material); dioxide=níłch'i ligaii(white air/gas); náhoodleeł=occurring again and again(cycle) \
Use in a sentence (English): The carbon cycle describes the way carbon atoms move around the Earth.  Carbon atoms move around when animals decompose, plants grow, fossil fuels are burned, and oceans absorb carbon dioxide (CO2).
Use in a sentence (Diné): T'eesh náhoodleeł nahasdzáán bikáá'góó éí bee t'eesh atom yee hadít'éhígíí nahasdzáán yináálzhish. Dahináánii naaldeehígíí daninéego bits'íís diłdzid dóó łeezh nináhádleeh, nanise dóó tsin bee dahidínísé, Áłk'idą́ą́' dahiháanii bits'íís ni'bitł'áahdi nídaasdlį́į́'ígíí dadilidgo bee nida'anish, dóó tó niteel hináanii biníłch'i, carbon dioxide, biih dahishigéésh.

Biological definition in english: Animals that eat other animals
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naaldeehii naaldeehii deiyánígíí
Literal Translation: naaldeehii=animals; daʼalghałígíí=eaters or butchers.
Use in a sentence (English): Mountain lions have very sharp teeth because they are carnivores and need to tear apart the animals they eat.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Násdóítsoh biwoo' háádahaashxchii'go áyóo dadeení éí yee naaldlooshii bits'į' nidayiiłdlaadgo deiyą́, háálá éí naaldeehii daʼalghałígíí ádaat'é.

Biological definition in english: Maximum population size of the species that the environment can sustain, given the food, habitat, water, and other necessities available in the environment
Defintion in Diné: Naaldlooshii haashį́į́ néelt'e'go íiyisíí kéyah bikáá'go da' ayą́ągo bihonéedzą́
Literal Translation: hináanii=living things; kéyah=land; choyooł'į́=they use it. Living using their land. (the perspective is that anything needed for life is used which includes places where they are located to be safe and survive, water and medicine that grow there all the time.)
Use in a sentence (English): If you use too many apps on your cell phone at once, it will slow down or stop working.  Similarly, the environment has a carrying capacity and can only support a certain number of organisms, otherwise the population size will decrease.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Bee hane'í nidaajaahígíí yee nidaalnishígíí, cell phone apps, t'óó ahayóí biih jiniłgo doo tsį́įłgo naalnish da, doodago doo naalnish da yileeh. Nahasdzáán biyi' dóó bikáá'góó, environment, t'áá ákót'é. Nahasdzáán choyooł'íinii haashį́į́ néelt'e'go t'éí yíká análwo'go bihonéedzą́.

Biological definition in english: Any substance that increases the rate of a reaction without itself being consumed
Defintion in Diné: Bee adiiltłáadii t'áadoole'é ahidiilyéego bee bina'anishígíí
Literal Translation: bee=by means of that, adiiltłáadii=a spark is created. By means of that which a spark is created
Use in a sentence (English): A catalyst makes an unlikely reaction more likely. For example, lactase is an enzyme catalyst that increases the rate that lactose, found in dairy products, is turned into two types of sugar that our bodies can use.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ha'át'íi da ahizhdiiléego, reaction, doo ádooníił da doo nawólníígóó éí t'áádoole'é bee adiiltłáád, catalyst, choo'į́įgo ahił dinish dóó ahidíníidah. T'óó bee hane'go abe' bitahdi lactase hólǫ́

Biological definition in english: The cell is the smallest unit with the basic properties of life, such as growth, sensing the environment, and reproduction.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól éí ats'íís bee ályaaígíí ts'ídá t'ááłá'ígo si'ánígíí náhidínísé, binaagóó yaa ákonízin, dóó ádéé'ál'į́įgo noosééł.
Literal Translation: ats’íís=body , bi=its, k'ǫ́ǫ́'=seed.
Distinction: need a microscope to look at it
Use in a sentence (English): Your body is composed of around 37 trillion cells! That is a big number but there are even more bacteria cells that live on and in you: around 100 trillion.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nits'íís tádiindi dóó bi'aan tsosts'idi trillion, táa'di dimííl ahą́ą́h nániildéeldi dimííltsoh hinááhts'ózí/ats'íís bitł'óól yee hadít'é! Ákondi ch'osh doo yit'íinii, bacteria cells, éí neeznádiindi dimííl ahą́ą́h nániildéeldi dimííltsoh nits'íís biyi'di dóó nąąhgóó dahólǫ́.

Literal Translation: ats’íís= body, bi=it, tats’íís= body, bi=it, tł’óól= strand.
Distinction: refers to DNA in cell. Often used when talking about cancer

Literal Translation: hinááh = living unit, ts'ózí=small, primal. Means "small primal unit of life"
hinááh = living unit, ts'óóz=slender, primal. Means "slender primal unit of life"

Biological definition in english: A part of a neuron that contains the nucleus where incoming signals are received.
Literal Translation: ats'óóz=nerve; nueron, bitsa'=its shell/body. The shell of a nerve or nueron.
Use in a sentence (English): The cell body of a neuron is like a train station.  It coordinates incoming and outgoing signals for the neuron.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ats'óóz bitsa' éí kǫ' na'ałbąąsii nihejeeh dóó dahidijeehgóne' nahalingo si'ą́. Ats'óóz atsiniltł'ish yee aniihíghíí yah íílį́ dóó níláhgóó náás dayídeeł.

Biological definition in english: The formation of new cells when an existing cell divides.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á níséehgo bee ats'íís bitł'óól ániidígíí náhoodleeł
Literal Translation: (body) cells growing apart
Use in a sentence (English): Bacteria like E. coli reproduce by cell division, where one cell copies itself and splits into two cells.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ch'osh doo yit'íinii, E. Coli gi ádaat'éhígíí, bíla'ashdla'ii dóó hináanii naaldeehii bitsą́ądi dahólónígíí áłts'ą́ dahiniséego yee ahoolchííł, t'ááłá'í si'ánígíí ádéé'iil'įįh áádóó ałts'á' ash.

Biological definition in english: Network of lipids and proteins that forms the boundary between the inside of a cell and the environment that surrounds it.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól bik'ésti'í éí ak'ah bizhool dóó ch'iyáán ats'íís hasht'ééyooldlíiłii bizhool bee ályaago ats;íís bikésti'
Literal Translation: covering for the (body) cells
Use in a sentence (English): The cell membrane is like the "skin" of the cell.  It separates the inside of the cell from the surrounding environment.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hinááhts'ózí/ats'íís bitł'óól bik'ésti'ii, cell membrane, éí bikágí át'é. Éí bee binaagóó bee hodít'éii bits'ąą t'áá sahdii hólǫ́

Biological definition in english: A structural layer surrounding cells of plants, bacteria, and other non-animal cells, found just outside the cell membrane
Defintion in Diné: Chil nanise', ch'osh doo yit'íinii dóó naaldeehii danilínígíí  yee nanise' dóó nanit'ąígíí bikágí.
Literal Translation: skin of plant cells
Use in a sentence (English): Penicillin is an antiobitic that can kill bacteria by stopping them from making cell walls.  This is why doctors prescribe it when you have an infection.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Azee' penicillin éí ats'íístahdi ba'at'é dahólóonii, ch'osh doo yit'íinii ádaat'éii, yik'ijį' naalnishgo bikágí doo ádeił'į́į da áko doo dahiinaah da. Éí biniyé azee'ííł'íní há yóki'.

Biological definition in english: The process through which cells convert sugars into ATP (energy)
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól yee biinéí dóó hinánígíí yee ádinaalnishígíí
Literal Translation: plants makes it energy
Use in a sentence (English): Cellular respiration takes place in the mitochondria and it produces the energy needed for cells to function properly.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hinááhts'ózí/ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di níłch'i, oxidation, yee naalnish dóó biziil, energy, ííł'į́įgo si'ą́ éí bee hinááhts'ózí biníłch'i nihwiileehgo ch'iyáán yidiłid. Éí bits'ą́ą́dóó hinááhts'ózí biinéí dóó bidziilgo naalnish.

Biological definition in english: An object or molecule has a charge if it has an unequal number of protons and electrons.
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'íi da protons dóó electrons bináhaazléí wólta'go bitsiniltł'ish ánéelt'e dóó ábóodziilígíí
Literal Translation: electricity; charge
Use in a sentence (English): An element has a neutral charge if it has an equal number of protons and electrons. It has a +1 positive charge if it has one more proton than electron.  It has a -1 negative charge if it has one more electron than proton.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ha'át'íi da t'áá ałtsoní bee ályaii, element, ła' biyi'di bitsíniltł'ish shá bik'ehgo siláhígíí, proton, dóó bikáá'gónaa bitsiniltł'ish shádáahjigo siláhígíí, electrons, ahee néelt'e'go doo háajigo da bitsiniltł'ish na'ałkid da, neutral charge, łeh. Bitsiniltł'ish shá bik'ehgo siláhígíí t'ááłá'í bee atis ánéelt'e'go éí atsinilt'ish, charge, shábik'ehgo na'ałkidígíí, positive, t'ááłá'í bee bilááh doo. Bitsiniltł'ish shádáahjigo siláhígíí t'ááłá'í bee atis ánéelt'e'go éí atsinilt'ish, charge, shádáahjigo na'ałkidígíí, negative, t'ááłá'í bee bilááh doo.

Biological definition in english: A substance that has a constant composition and characteristic properties.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da t'ááłáhági át'éego hadít'é dóó t'ááłáhági át'éego naalnishígíí
Literal Translation: something that does not change
Use in a sentence (English): Did you know water is a chemical?  Each molecule of water contains two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom that bond together, which is why it is called H20.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Tó éí ha'át'íi da t'áá ałtsóní bee ályaii, element, díkwíi da ałtah ályaii, chemical, át'é éísh baa ákonínízin? Tó t'ááłá'í hadaałt'éego si'ánígíí, molecule, níłch'ih łikoní ászólí naakigo dóó níłch'ih łigaií, oxygen, t'ááłá'ígo bił ahii'sinilgo da'ahótą' éí bąą Hąó bee wójí dóó naaltsoos bikáá' áł'į́.

Biological definition in english: This type of energy is what holds atoms of a molecule or molecules of a substance together. When these groups of atoms or molecules are separated during a chemical reaction, chemical energy is released, often as heat.  When organisms photosynthesize or digest food, chemical reactions provide chemical energy for their growth and development.
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é yee bidziilii yee ałch'į' bótá'ii. Díí ałtsá'niłgo yee bidziilii áyóó' át'éego sidogo bits'áshígish
Literal Translation: anything its energy
Use in a sentence (English): The battery in your car or phone uses checmical energy from the battery to function.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nichi'dí éí doodago bee hane'í nani'áhígíí bijéí biyi'di bitoo' dóó bee ályaii ahił nidaalnishgo bits'ą́ą́dóó biziil náhoodleełgo bee hane'í naalnish.

Biological definition in english: Any process in which substances combine or are broken down into other substances when chemical bonds between atoms are formed or broken
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da t'ááła' bizhi'go t'áá náó'nííłgo bits'ą́ą́dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ náádleeł doo áko bee ályaii yee da'áhótą'ígíí ałts'á há'nííł éí doodago łahgo át'éego ádaalne'
Literal Translation: anything differently it becomes
Use in a sentence (English): Jewlery that is made of nickel and silver can produce a chemical reaction with oxygen that will turn your skin green.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Ootseed álnéehgo choo'ínígíí éí béésh nitł'izí nickel dóó béésh łigaii silver bee látsíní da ádaalne' áko bééshígíí níłch'i łigaií oxygen bił ałtah yileeh éí bąą nikágí t'iis bit'ąą' nahalingo dootł'izh doo.

Biological definition in english: Cells that create their own energy and biological materials from inorganic chemicals
Defintion in Diné: Hinááts'ózí cells binaagóó ha'át'íi da doo hináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' dahólónígíí yee biinéí doo bidziil dooígíí t'áá bí ííł'į́
Literal Translation: anything that
Use in a sentence (English): Most chemotrophs live in harsh environments like hot spring pools or near thermal vents at the bottom of the ocean.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Dahináanii binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí bee t'áá bí biziil energy ánayoodlííłígíí doo hats'íí ádahoot'éedi dahiná tó sidoh hadaazlį́įgi éí doodago tó niteel bitł'áahdi nahasdzáán biyi'dę́ę́' hadahonigahgóó dahiná.

Biological definition in english: Any green molecule that converts light energy into chemical energy during photosynthesis
Defintion in Diné: Nanise' yee dadootł'izhígíí adinídíín (shánídíín) łahgo áyiił'įįhgo bee bitoo' naalnish yileehgo biinéí
Literal Translation: nanise' = refers to vegatative growth, bitoo' = juice, dootł'izhí = green. "The green juice of the plant"
Use in a sentence (English): Plants use different colored pigments, such as chlorophyll, to absorb light and turn it into chemical energy, just as solar panels absorb sunlight and convert it to electricity.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nanise' ałtaas'éí plants ał'ąą át'éego bee nidaashch'ąą'ígíí, t'iis bit'ąą'go dootł'izhígíí yee shánídíín yił naalnishgo bits'ą́ą́dóó biziil, energy, ádá ííł'į́, áádóó tł'óó'góó shánídíín náyiilááhígíí, solar panels, biyi'di bik'i' diidíingo atsiniltł'ish yee ííł'į́, éí ákódaat'éhígíí bii'dii yee hadít'éii ahił nidaalnish bits'ą́ą́dóó yee hináá dóó yee bidziilii ádeił'į́.

Biological definition in english: A cell organelle that contains chlorophyll, which produces energy through photosynthesis
Defintion in Diné: Nanise' bihiináts'ózí biyi'di si'ą́ągo adinídíín yee binéí áyosinígíí
Literal Translation: nanise' = refers to vegatative growth, biziil = strength, ííł'íní = making it. meaning "The growing things streangth is made"
Use in a sentence (English): If we think of chlorophyll as the solar panels of the plant cell, then chloroplasts are like a field that contains many solar panels.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nanise' yee dadootł'izhígíí éí shánídíín náyiiláhí, solar panels, beełt'éego nanise' bii' hólǫ́. Nanise' biyi'di, chloroplasts, yee biziil ádá ííł'ínígíí éí tł'óó'góó shánídíín náyiiláhá t'óó ahayóí sinil nahalingo baa nitsíikees.

Biological definition in english: A structure made up of DNA tightly coiled many times around proteins
Defintion in Diné: Iiná bitł'óól nídahineeshzhee'go ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di dahólónígíí
Literal Translation: iiná bitł'óól = DNA. bit'oh = nest. Meaning, Nests of DNA
Use in a sentence (English): Humans have two copies of 23 chromosomes.  People who have an extra copy of one or part of their 21st chromosome are born with a condition called Down Syndrome.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Bíla'ashdla'ii bits'íís biyi'di iiná bitł'óól, DNA, ałk'ídeesdizgo ats'íís bitł'óól bii' siláhígíí, chromosome, naadiintáá' bii' hólǫ́ éí naakidi bééda'alyaago, two copies, hats'íís bii'silá. Hái da díí chromosome béé'ályaaígíí t'ááłá'í bee bilááh bee hólǫ́ǫgo éí doodago iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídeesdizí naadiinła'góne si'ánígíí t'áá bighąądígi bił yizhchį́įgo éí Down Syndrome bee bąąh dahaz'ą́ągo doochííł.

Biological definition in english: A natural, internal process that regulates daily cycles of sleep or inactivity and wakefulness or activity
Defintion in Diné: Niyiiłkaah dóó aná'át'áahjį' hats'íís biyi'di ajiłhosh, ninájílnish dóó hasht'ez dít'é bee bíhólníihgo nijigháhígíí
Use in a sentence (English): The circadian rhythm of sunflowers lets them anticipate the timing and direction of the sunrise each morning so that they can face their flowers towards the sun.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Circadian rhythm éí hináanii bits'íís yee jį́įgo dóó tł'ée'go ahééh hwiilzhííshígíí yik'ehgo naaldeeh dóó nidanise'ígíí óolyé. Nidíyílii abinígo háá'áago bílátah hózhóón ha'a'aahjigo niiłki' éí shá yíka'ałkidgo át'į́.

Biological definition in english: The system that moves blood, oxygen, nutrients, waste, and other materials throughout the body. The circulatory system includes the heart, arteries, and veins
Defintion in Diné: Hats'íístahgóó hadił nidaazlį́įgo bee níłch'i dóó ch'iyáán hats'íís bitah hólǫ́ǫgo áyósin áádóó hats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdígíí hats'áyiiléego jiinánígíí. Kót'éego binaanishígíí éí hajéídíshjool, hats'oos łichí'í dóó hats'oos dootł'izhí.
Use in a sentence (English): When you have high blood pressure, your circulatory system doesn't function as well becuase your heart has to work harder to pump the same amount of blood through your body.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hadił hódahgo na'ałkidgo hats'íístahgóó hats'óós dóó dił yee hadít'éhígíí doo hazhó'ó naalnish da háálá hajéídíshjool yéego yich'į' naaldzilgo hadił t'áá át'é náásgóó ayiiłt'ood.

Biological definition in english: The change in global or regional weather patterns over time.  This occured naturally over time, but recently increased levels of carbon dioxide due to the use of fossil fuels from the mid to late 20th century onwards has caused climate change to occur faster.
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó dóó hót'ááhgóó áhoot'éhígíí hado dóó hak'az, níłtsą́, dóó nídaadzasígíí łahgo áániił. T'áá bí éí łahgo ánáánííł nít'ę́ę́' k'adgo níłch'i carbon dioxide wolyéhígíí bilááh ánéelt'e' silį́į́' ałk'idą́ą́' dahináanii bik'éé dahwiilzhiizhii bits'ą́ą́dóó kǫ' choo'į́įgo biniinaa níłch'i ał'ąą ánáá'nííł łahgo áyiilaa.
Literal Translation: atmospheric conditions that change seasonably to extreme they change
Use in a sentence (English): Climate change is causing weather extremes, such as increasing temperatures and making droughts more common in the southwest United States.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Tł'óógóó níłch'i ał'ąą ánáá'nííłígíí łahgo áániił silį́į́'ígíí bits'ą́ą́'dóó hado, hak'az, níłtsą́ dóó níyol doo deeghánídi bilááhgóó nidaalnish éí bąą ayóo deesdoiígíí bits'ą́ą́dóó díí Kéyah Ahii'sinil shádi'ááh dóó e'e'aahjí nahós'a'góó doo nidahałtin da.

Biological definition in english: A form of inheritance in which both alleles are expressed equally in the phenotype of the heterozygote
Literal Translation: inheritance from the parents, mother and father, one is born with from both side are equal
Use in a sentence (English): When a chicken with white feathers breeds with a chicken with black feathers, the next generation has both black and white feathers because both alleles for feather color are codominant.

Biological definition in english: Interacting group of various species in a common location
Defintion in Diné: T'áá łáhági haz'ą́ągi ha'át'ííshį́į́ dahinááshį́į́ ahił nidaalnish dahinánígíí
Literal Translation: living in one place together
Use in a sentence (English): Hummingbirds and fields of flowers are in the same community because the hummingbirds need the flowers for nectar and the flowers need hummingbirds to spread their pollen.

Biological definition in english: A negative interaction that occurs whenever two or more organisms require the same limited resource
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii t'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągo kééhat'į́įgo bee da'iináanii ałghadeidit'áahígíí
Literal Translation: life resource fighting over it/taking it away from one another
Use in a sentence (English): In the winter when there are few plants, the deer are in competition with one another for who gets to eat them.

Biological definition in english: An organism that obtains food by feeding on other organisms.
Literal Translation: living things some other living thing its food it makes it
Use in a sentence (English): A hawk is a consumer that eats mice and other small mammals.  Mice are also consumers and eat plants and bugs.

Biological definition in english: A highly reactive substance that causes obvious damage to living tissue
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da bideezla' ayóo atí'áł'į́įgo ats'íís átííł'ínígíí
Literal Translation: toxic substance that eats away/wears away/deterioates
Use in a sentence (English): Many household cleaners like bleach are corrosive because they can start to burn and harm your skin when left on the surface for too long.

Diné word: hinááhts'ózí biyi' di bijéí binaagóó hólónígíí
Biological definition in english: All of the contents of a cell excluding the nucleus
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól biyi' hólónígíí t'áá át'é ákondi bijéí nucleus éí doo bił ólta'góó
Literal Translation: hinááhts'ózí biyi' di bijéí = nuclues (heart of the cell). binaagóó = surrounding. hólónígíí = exists. Meaning, "the contents of a cell around the nucleus"
Use in a sentence (English): If we think of a cell as a jello salad, the cytoplasm is like the jello because it suspends and holds the contents inside.

Biological definition in english: A collection of facts, such as numbers, words, measurements, observations or descriptions of thing
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'íi da dayéélta', bída'néél'ąądígíí, saad da, haalzíidgo bikáá' ályaii, dóó baa hane'go aha'ádaalyaii
Literal Translation: facts/evidence that compiled and counted
Use in a sentence (English): When you write notes about something you see, like the number of petals on a flower, you are collecting data.

Biological definition in english: The number of total deaths in comparison to the total population size in a specified community or area over a specified period of time
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da diné kééhat'į́įgo daashį́į́ néelt'e' ákwe'é kééhát'į́ éí daashį́į́ néelt'e' haashį́į́ nízahjį' nihoolzhiizhgo daneeznánígíí/bikéé' ádahasdįįd yéélta'ígíí ałch'į' sinilgo baa hane'
Literal Translation: deaths in a given area
Use in a sentence (English): If 20 cows die on a farm with 100 total cows, then we could say that 0.2 cows die for every cow on the farm (20 cows / 100 cows = 0.2 cows).

Biological definition in english: The breakdown of dead organism through the action of bacteria and fungi
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ła' daaztsą́ągo ch'osh doo yit'íinii dóó dláád ádaat'éii yaa tįįh yikaigo ałtso dííłdzidgo
Literal Translation: break down/deterioation
Use in a sentence (English): The mold we see on old fruit is a type of fungus that decays the fruit.

Biological definition in english: The process by which dead organic substances are broken down into simpler organic or inorganic material
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináá nít'ę́ę'go ádin silį́į́' dóó bits'íís táánoodééh dóó dííyahgo ła' łeezh nídaasdlį́į́' dóó bits'iilzéí dahólǫ́.
Literal Translation: living thing/things breaking down and becoming soil
Use in a sentence (English): The leaves that fall on the ground during autum are important because they decompose and become a part of the soil, which helps other plants grow.

Biological definition in english: Barren area of land where little precipitation occurs
Defintion in Diné: Kéyah bikáá'góó áłch'į́į́dígo ninádahałtį́įhgi
Literal Translation: place where nothing grows and dry
Use in a sentence (English): The Sonoran Desert is found in the southwestern United States and the species that live in it can survive long periods of time with little to no rain.

Biological definition in english: The movement of molecules from an areas where there are many to where there are fewer
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'íi da bizhool molecules łą́ hólónídóó áłch'į́į́dí hólǫ́ǫjį' ashiigéeshgo
Literal Translation: movement away from heavier to lighter concentration
Use in a sentence (English): As you add tea leaves to hot water, the tea will start to spread through the water.  This is an example of diffusion.

Biological definition in english: The organs that take in food and liquids and break them down into substances that the body can use for energy, growth, and tissue repair. Waste products the body cannot use leave the body through bowel movements
Defintion in Diné: Atsą́ níléí ch'iyáán dóó jidlánígíí néedił'eel dóó bitoo' ádaat'éí yee ats'íís bidziil, biinéí, dóó hats'íís háidoodlííł. Ha'át'ííshį́į́ hats'íís doo choyooł'į́į da dooígíí éí hach'íí' bee níláhgóó kót'į́
Literal Translation: that which breaks down food to watery substance, usually sweet
Use in a sentence (English): Your digestive system includes your mouth, stomach, and intestines. All of these organs play a role in breaking down food you can absorb nutrients and energy.

Diné word: hinááhts'ozí iiná bitł'óól naaki bee hólǫ́
Biological definition in english: A cell or organism having two sets of chromosome
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól éí doodago hináanii bi iiná bitł'óól ałk'í daadeesdizígíí chromosomes naaki níláago bee dahólónígíí
Literal Translation: (body) cell having two chromosomes
Use in a sentence (English): Most cells in our body are diploid and have a copy of each chromosome from both of our parents.

Biological definition in english: A change in a living body that prevents it from functioning normally.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís haashį́į́ yidzaago doo hazhó'ó naalnish da silį́į'go bee bihodiit'i'
Literal Translation: disease that dibilitates a body or living thing
Use in a sentence (English): When many think about diseases we first think about cancer or the flu. However, it is important to not forget about mental health diseases like depression or anxiety.

Biological definition in english: A long molecule that contains our unique genetic information. It holds the instructions for making all of the proteins in our bodies.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól nineezgo hats'íís biyi'di hólónígíí bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii yee hadít'é. Bik'ehgo ch'iyáán ats'íís ánáyoodlíiłii proteins hats'íístahgóó hólónígíí nihwiileeh.
Literal Translation: iiná = life, bitł'óól = strand. Meaning "strand of life"
Use in a sentence (English): Construction workers need instructions to know how to build a building.  Cells use DNA as instructions to tell them what to do and how to make things.

Biological definition in english: The process by which DNA is copied during cell division
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís bitł'óól ałts'á hiniséego iiná bitł'óól biyi'di dahólónígíí bééda'alne'
Literal Translation: iiná bitł'óól = DNA. ádéé'alnééh = copy. Meaning, "a strand of life copying itself"
Use in a sentence (English): In humans, DNA is about 6 billion base pairs long. DNA needs to be copied accurately each time a cell divides. Sometimes there can be an error in the DNA replication process. This is one way mutations can arise.

Biological definition in english: The allele that determines the phenotype when present in a homozygote or heterozygote. Compare with recessive.
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii bee ázhnoolnin dóó ájít'éhígíí áyiił'įįh hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' bik'ehgo náás ooch'íiłii bee hojileehígíí aheełt'éego (homozygote) éí doodago doo aheełt'ée dago (heterozygote)
Literal Translation: basic substance of life that works ahead of others
Use in a sentence (English): An individual with one allele for type-O blood and one allele for type-B blood will have type-B blood because the  allele for type-B blood is dominant to the allele for type-O blood.

Diné word: bee ats'íís haleehii alą́ąjį' naalnish bee ájít'é yileehii
Biological definition in english: An inherited characteristic that appears in an offspring if it is received from a parent through a dominant allele. Compare with recessive trait.
Defintion in Diné: Ho'dizhchíídóó hojizhlį́į'go ázhnoolnin dóó ájít'éhígíí bee jinooséełii hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii alą́ąjį' (dominant) naalnishígíí bik'ehgo jinoosééł silį́į'go.  Recessive éí bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii akéédóó bik'ehgo anoosééł.
Literal Translation: basic substance of life that works ahead of others that forms one's being
Use in a sentence (English): A dominant trait is determined by a dominant allele. For example, if you have an allele for light eyes and an allele for dark eyes you will have dark eyes because that allele is dominant over the allele for light eyes.

Biological definition in english: The study of how organisms interact with one another and with their environment
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ał'ąą ádaat'éhígíí bił haz'ą́ągi ahił dahi'ná dóó binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí chodayooł'ínígíí
Literal Translation: learning the environment of how living things live together
Use in a sentence (English): Emissions from coal plants can affect the ecology of an ecosystem by polluting the environment and affecting how organisms survive and interact with each other.

Biological definition in english: An environment including every living organism and non-living factor that is contained within it
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáa'gi haz'ą́ągo ákwe'é ha'át'ííshį́į́ dahinááshį́į́ dóó doo hináanii bee hahodít'éhígíí t'áá ałtso
Literal Translation: the place where living things exist
Use in a sentence (English): Deserts, rain forests, and and coral reefs are all ecosystems with distinct climates and species.

Biological definition in english: An organism whose internal temperature depends on the temperature of their surrounding environment
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naaldeehii binaagóó áhoot'éhígíí bik'ehgo bits'íístahdi sizil dóó náhiniik' áás
Literal Translation: the means of body heat for living things
Use in a sentence (English): Ectotherms, like lizards, can't control their body temperature and often lay in the sun to warm up.

Biological definition in english: The female sex cell, or gamete. Compare with sperm.
Defintion in Diné: Asdzání bik'eelyéí
Literal Translation: animal egg
Use in a sentence (English): In many species, females pass on their DNA to their offspring through their egg cells.

Literal Translation: seed; seedling

Biological definition in english: The components of an atom that have a negative charge
Defintion in Diné: Atoms bee ályaii shádáahjigo bitsiniltł'ish hoo'nááłígíí
Literal Translation: that which surrounds an atom
Use in a sentence (English): Electrons are the glue that hold atoms together when they combine to form a molecule.

Biological definition in english: A pure substance that is made of only one type of atom. Elements cannot be broken down into any simpler substance.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da atom t'ááłá'ígo bee ályaaígíí. Atom t'ááłá'i yileehgo doo tanáó'níiłgo ha'át'íi da náádoodleeł da.
Literal Translation: matter or substances that make all that exists
Use in a sentence (English): Elements are made up of a group of atoms that are all the same, just like a field of corn is made up of many individual corn plants.

Biological definition in english: The movement of individuals out of a particular population or area to other populations or areas. Compare with immigration.
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii dayikah nít'ę́ę́' yits'á dahanééhgo nááná łahjí dahyikahígíí yił yah adahnéehgo.
Literal Translation: people moving out
Use in a sentence (English): You could say that when you leave your classroom and walk out into the hall that you are emigrating from your classroom.

Biological definition in english: An organism whose internal temperature can be contantly maintained and does not depend on the temperature of their surrounding environment
Defintion in Diné: Dahinánii dóó naaldeehii bits'íís silzil dóó náhiniik'áásígíí t'áá łáhági silkidgo ádayósinígíí. Binaadę́ę́' nahooniidoh dóó náhoniik'asígíí éí doo binahjį' bits'íís sizil da.
Literal Translation: from within the body the means of heat
Use in a sentence (English): You are an endotherm! Endotherms often have hair or feathers to help keep warm and may sweat or pant to cool down. These adaptations help them maintain a constant temperature.

Biological definition in english: The ability to do work, produce change, or create heat.  There are many types of energy.  For example, heat energy (also known as thermal energy) is created when molecules move around quickly and randomly within a substance, which releases heat.  Chemical energy is what holds atoms of a molecule or molecules of a substance together.  When these groups of atoms or molecules are separated during a chemical reaction, chemical energy is released, often as heat.  When organisms photosynthesize or digest food, chemical reactions provide chemical energy for their growth and development.
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é biziil yee biinéí dóó bidziilgo yee naalnish, ha'át'íi da łahgo áyooliił, doodago hadoh bits'ą́ą́dóó hólǫ́ (thermal energy). Łą́ ał'ąą át'é.
Literal Translation: biziil; ’ahóodziil= energy. (you modify the a depending what you're talking about)
Use in a sentence (English): The sun is a source of heat energy because it warms the earth.  Plants convert light from the sun into chemical energy through photosynthesis.

Biological definition in english: A picture that represents how much energy, initially from the sun, is retained or stored in living organisms at each trophic level in an ecosystem
Defintion in Diné: Shá bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' deesdoiígíí hináanii bił nahaz'ą́ądi dóó biyi'di hasht'e dit'eehígíí.
Literal Translation: Sun's energy contained in a living thing's body

Biological definition in english: The air, water, and land in or on which all living organisms live
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii dóó naaldeehii bá haz'ą́ągi níłch'I, tó, dóó kéyah yee dahinánígíí
Literal Translation: an area on land
Use in a sentence (English): Cacti can survive in hot and dry environments because they are good at storing and conserving water.

Biological definition in english: A substance that acts as a catalyst in living organisms, regulating the rate at which chemical reactions proceed without itself being altered in the process
Defintion in Diné: Naaldeehii bits'íístahdi ch'iyáán yididiiłił go yee bidziil dóó hináadoogo éí ch'iyáán bits'íístahdi shoogishígíí yee yidiłidígíí hodooleeł éí ch'iyáán yidiiłtláadgo bits'ą́ą́dóó biinéí dóó bidziil.
Literal Translation: something that burns food
Use in a sentence (English): People that are lactose intolerant cannot make the enzyme called lactase which prevents them from digesting lactose in milk.

Biological definition in english: The outermost layer of cells of any multicellular organism
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'íís bitł'óól (cells) bikágí
Literal Translation: skin of things
Use in a sentence (English): Your skin is your epidermis and it protects the inside of your body from harm.

Biological definition in english: A state of balance or stable situation where opposite effects cancel each other out and no changes are occuring.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'éegi da haz'ą́ągi t'áá ałtsoní hasht'e dadiit'eeh dóó ha'át'íi da doo ba'át'e' hólǫ́ǫ da yileeh. Ha'át'íi da doo ałk'ijį dooldził da, ahíhoneel'ą́ haleeh.
Literal Translation: things are in balance
Use in a sentence (English): A see-saw is in equilibrium when both kids are perfectly balanced on it.

Biological definition in english: Organisms whose cells contain a nucleus. Compare with prokaryote.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'íís bitł'óól biyi'di bijéí dahólónígíí
Literal Translation: living things that have a heart (nucleus) in their cells
Use in a sentence (English): Most of the living things you see around you, including all plants and animals, are eukaryotes.

Biological definition in english: The available facts or information that indicate a belief or statement is true or valid
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íida t'áá aaníí át'é bee bééhózinígíí nídiilyáago binahjį' baa ha'oodzíí' dóó woodlánígíí t'áá aaníigo baa nitsáhákees.
Literal Translation: by means of which something is valid

Biological definition in english: Changes in the frequency of alleles over generations
Defintion in Diné: Ayoonaałgo bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łahgo ánídaa'níiłgo bik'ehgo ahii' háá' ayoochííł.
Literal Translation: living things coming into existence
Use in a sentence (English): Over the course of evolution, birds like ostriches lost the ability to fly as they evolved to survive well without flight.

Biological definition in english: A hard covering on the outside of the body used for support, protection, and muscle attachment. Examples include the shells of snails and the outer covering of beetles.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'a' dahólónígíí bits'íís bits'a' yee naazį́ dóó naaghá.
Use in a sentence (English): Scorpions have an exoskeleton that protects them from predators.

Biological definition in english: A test done in order to learn something or to discover whether something works or is true.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da t'áá aaníí át'é dóó ó'ooł'įįłgi nabíhonitaahgo naalkaah.
Use in a sentence (English): If you have dipped your toe into water  to see if it was warm enough for you  to swim, then you have conducted an  experiment!

Biological definition in english: Occurs when there are no more individuals of that species alive anywhere in the world
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da ałtso eeldee' éí doodago bił ahóóyáago doo ła' yidziih da silį́į́'ígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Wooly mammoths died thousands of years ago and this species is now extinct.

Biological definition in english: The act or process of a species becoming extinct
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii ła' ha'át'ííshį́į́ biniinaa áádįįł silį́į'go
Use in a sentence (English): There are very few black footed ferrets still alive and they are at risk for extinction.

Biological definition in english: The process of combinine the male sperm with the female egg to produce a cell called a zygote.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii biką' dóó bi'áádígíí bik'eelyéí ahidiina'go bits'ą́ą́dóó biyázhí iilts'ą'ígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Most of the living things you see around you, including all plants and animals, are eukaryotes.

Biological definition in english: The ability of an individual to successfully produce offspring compared to other individuals of the same species.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii biyázhí yishchínígíí yisdádoogáałgo bidziilgo hináadoo
Use in a sentence (English): In many species, organisms pass on their DNA to their offspring when an egg and sperm cell combine during fertilization.

Biological definition in english: A linear sequence of organisms through which nutrients and energy pass as one organism eats another
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii ałkéé' bił honí'ą́ągo dahnaazhjaa'go bich'iiyą' nídanidlį́
Use in a sentence (English): A large, healthy deer that mates often will have higher fitness than a small, unhealthy deer that doesn't mate as often.

Biological definition in english: Represents multiple pathways through which energy and nutrients flow through an ecosystem. It includes many intersecting food chains. It demonstrates that most organisms eat, and are eaten, by more than one species.
Defintion in Diné: Ch'iyáán dahideezláádóó dahiníláajį' bee hahodít'éego nahaz'ą́. Łahgóó ahéédadiit'I'
Use in a sentence (English): Eagles eat mice, mice eat grain, and these three species form a food chain.

Biological definition in english: A fossil forms over a very long time as holes left in sediment by living tissue or bones are replaced with hard minerals.
Defintion in Diné: Ałk'idą́ą́' dahináá nít'ę́ę́'yę́ę bits'iil
Use in a sentence (English): Dinosaur bones are fossils and they tell us when and where dinosaurs used to live.

Biological definition in english: A material formed from the decomposing organisms that can release energy as heat or be used for work. These fuels are found within the Earth and exist in limited quantities. Examples include coal, oil, and natural gas.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii daneeznánée dadiłdzid bits'ą́ą́dóó ha'át'íi da nihwiileehígíí biziil (energy) bits'áłdohígíí (heat) bee nida'anish. Nahasdzáán biyi'di dahólǫ́ haashį́į́ danéelt'e'go. Łeejin/tsékǫ', ak'ah łizhiní dóó níłch'i  ászólí ááh ha'ní.
Use in a sentence (English): Oil, gas, and coal are called fossil fuels because they are made from the carbon and hydrogen of living things from millions of years ago. Power plants release carbon dioxide when they burn fossil fuels, which contributes to climate change.

Biological definition in english: Living organisms that get their nutrients by absorbing them.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bich'iiyą' binaagóó hólónígíí néidił'eełgo bikágí biníkáágóne'  biihishigéeshgo yee hiná.
Literal Translation: mold
Use in a sentence (English): The green or white patches on old bread are a type of fungi called mold.

Biological definition in english: A haploid reproductive cell that joins with another haploid reproductive cell of the opposite sex to form a diploid zygote.
Defintion in Diné: Bi'áadii bik'eelyéí bihinááts'óóz biyi'di iiná bitł'óóól ałk'ídaadeesdizígíí chromosomes t'áá ałní'ígo ánéelt'e' dóó biką'ii bik'eelyéí bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di iiná bitł'óóól ałk'ídaadeesdizígíí chromosomes t'áá ałní'ígo ánéelt'e'ígíí ahidiinahgo bits'ą́ą́dóó biyázhí (zygote) bits'íís bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídadeesdizígíí t'áá át'é bii' dahólǫ́.
Use in a sentence (English): Sperm and eggs are examples of haploid cells.

Diné word: bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łago át'e silį́į́'ígíí t'áá át'é
Biological definition in english: A section of DNA that is the unit of heredity for a trait.
Defintion in Diné: Iiná bitł'óól bąąhgi bik'ehgo jinooséełgo t'áá jizį́į́ nít'ę́ę́' ájít'é dooleełígíí
Use in a sentence (English): In cats, fur length is determined by one gene, but body size is influenced by many genes.

Biological definition in english: All of the alleles of all the genes in a population of a specific species at a given time.
Defintion in Diné: T'áá hoolzhishgi dahináanii t'áá sahdii dahyikahgo yik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii łahgo át'é daazlį́į'ígíí t'áá ałtso ááł jiní
Use in a sentence (English): A species with red and orange flowers has alleles for red and orange flower color in its gene pool.

Biological definition in english: A species that can thrive in many different environmental conditions or use different types of resources. Compare with specialist.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii ła' dahyikahgo łahgo ánáhoo'níiłgi kéédahat'į́ éí doodago yee dahináanii ał'ąą ádaat'éego yee kééhát'į́
Use in a sentence (English): A raccoon is an example of a generalist.  It lives in a variety of habitats, from cities to forests, and it eats a lot of different types of food.

Biological definition in english: All of the organisms born and living at about the same time. In humans, mother and daughters represent two generations
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii t'áá ałhąąh daazhchí dóó danihinánígíí, Amá dóó ach'é'é éí naakidi azhchínígíí át'é
Use in a sentence (English): During elementary school, all the kids in your class are a part of your generation because all of you have similar ages.

Biological definition in english: A disease that is caused by a change (mutation) in an individual's DNA sequence
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii ałkéé' sinilyę́ę łahgo ádzaago ba'át'e' hazlį́į'go bits'ą́ą́dóó ąąh dahaz'ą́ bił oochííł yileeh.
Use in a sentence (English): A disease like xeroderma pigmentosum makes you sensitive to sunlight and is a genetic disorder because it can be inherited from your parents.

Biological definition in english: The deliberate modification of the characteristics of an organism by changing its DNA or RNA
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináanii bits'íís dóó bíni' da yee hadít'éhígíí t'áá ákólnéehgo be'iiná bitł'óól łahgo ál'įįhígíí
Use in a sentence (English): There are types of corn that have had their DNA genetically engineered so that they can resist insect herbivores.  Organisms that have had their DNA engineered are called genetically modified organisms (GMOs).

Biological definition in english: The study of genes and inheritance in living organisms
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii yik'ehgo náás oołchííłígíí dóó yił oołchíiłii nidaalkaahgo t'áá át'é bíhoo'aah
Literal Translation: bik'ehgo = following, náás oochíiłii = forward birth, naalkaah = study/ research. Meaning, "study the following of reproduction"
Use in a sentence (English): A scientist who studies corn genetics researches how traits and diseases are inherited and affect yield.

Biological definition in english: All of an organism's DNA
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináanii bits'íís bitł'óól t'áá ałtso bits'íís bii' hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): We can compare the genomes of different people to see if we can identify which alleles cause diseases.

Diné word: hái da bi allele t'áá ałtso
Biological definition in english: All of the alleles in a given individual's genome
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináanii yik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii łahgo át'é daazlį́į́'ígíí t'áá ałtso
Literal Translation: someone's allele all of it
Use in a sentence (English): A sheep's genotype may include alleles for white wool and black wool, but because the black allele is dominant, the sheep's phenotype will be black wool.

Biological definition in english: The science that deals with the earth's physical structure, the materials it is made of, its history, and the processes that act on it.
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán ninálkaahgo ha'át'íi da yee hadít'éhígíí, biyi'di dóó bikáá'góó hólónígíí dahazlį́į́'dę́ę́' dóó yee naalnishígíí bíhoo'aah
Literal Translation: nahasdzáán=earth, naalkaah= study study of earth
Use in a sentence (English): A scientist who studies geology can research how structures like mountains and canyons were formed.

Biological definition in english: The increase in the Earth's average temperature. Recently, temperatures are rising rapidly due to increases in the levels of greenhouse gases.
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáá'góó sidooígíí de'áániił. Níłch'i hado yił hidideełígíí, greenhouse gases, łą́ dahshoogish silį́į́'ígíí biniinaa nahasdzáán ayóo sido silį́į́'.
Literal Translation: the earth upon it the heat increases
Use in a sentence (English): One of the results of burning fossil fuels is global warming, which is causing a rise in the average temperature of the planet.

Biological definition in english: The simple sugar that is the main source of energy. Glucose is found in the blood and is the main sugar that the body makes.
Defintion in Diné: Łikání hadił bitahdi hólǫ́ǫgo íiyisíí bee hadziil dóó hwiinéí áhósinígíí óolyé. Łikání glucose wolyéhígíí hadił bitahdi hólǫ́ éí hats'íís ííł'į́įgo hadił bitahdi niheleeh.
Literal Translation: substances from digested food by means of which one has life
Use in a sentence (English): Someone with diabetes needs to monitor their glucose levels, which is the amount of sugar that is in their bloodstream.

Biological definition in english: Any gas that can absorb heat from Earth's surface and keeps it from leaving the atmosphere into space.
Defintion in Diné: Níłch'i nahasdzáán bikáá'góó náhoniidohígíí yił hidideeł dóó doo yiidichxíid dago biniinaa doo nahasdzáán bits'ą́ąjį' aheldóoh da.
Literal Translation: air that captures heat
Use in a sentence (English): Greenhouse gases act like a blanket around Earth, trapping heat instead of letting it escape from the atmosphere.

Biological definition in english: Place where an organism or a community of organisms lives, including all living and nonliving factors or conditions of the environment
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii kééhat'į́įgi áádóó ákwe'é haz'ą́ągi t'áá ałtsoní bee hahodít'éego haz'ą́
Literal Translation: place where living things live
Use in a sentence (English): Some animal species can only survive in a specific habitat, like roadrunners that live in the deserts, brushlands, and grasslands of North America.

Biological definition in english: A cell or organism having a single set of chromosomes
Defintion in Diné: Hinááts'ózí éí doodago hináanii bits'íístahdi iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídeesdizígíí chromosomes t'ááłáhájí t'éí biyi'di hólǫ́
Literal Translation: DNA just one (of a pair)
Use in a sentence (English): Unlike most cells in our body, egg and sperm cells are haploid and have one copy of each chromosome.

Biological definition in english: Animals that eat plants
Defintion in Diné: Na'at'i'í éí doodago naaldlooshii chil deiłchozhígíí
Literal Translation: animals plants they eat those
Use in a sentence (English): Rabbits are herbivores that only eat leaves, seeds, twigs, and other parts of plants.

Biological definition in english: The passing on of traits from parents to offspring through genetic information.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii yizhchíigo bimá dóó bizhé'é yik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii bee bik'i' aschínígíí yee hadít'é yileeh
Literal Translation: things in the reproductive process
Use in a sentence (English): Scientific discoveries about heredity allow scientists to identify the causes of many genetic disorders.

Biological definition in english: An organism that eats plants or animals for energy and nutrients (compare with autotroph)
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináanii bidziil dóó yee hináadoo biniyé ch'il/nanise' dóó níláhgóó dahináanii yiyą́
Use in a sentence (English): People, insects, fish, and birds are examples of heterotrophs because they must eat plants and animals to survive.

Diné word: bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii naaki ał'ąą át'é
Biological definition in english: An individual who has two different alleles of a gene. Compare with homozygote.
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii bi'iiná bitł'óól bąąhgi bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii gene naaki ał'ąą át'éego hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Individuals who only have one sickle cell allele are heterozygotes at that locus and will not display sickle cell disease.

Biological definition in english: A state in which an animal’s body processes are slower than usual, its body temperature falls, and its activities are limited, usually during winter or when food is scarce.
Defintion in Diné: Haigo éí doodago ch'iyáán doo łą́ dahólǫ́ǫ da haleehgo na'at'i'í dóó naaldlooshii bits'íís ni'át'įįh, doo ayóo naha'ná da, doo ayóo sizil da,
Use in a sentence (English): Many animals that live in the mountains hibernate because there is little food in the cold winter months.

Biological definition in english: The ability of the body or a cell to maintain a stable internal environment despite changes in external conditions.
Defintion in Diné: Níláhgóó ał'ąą ánáhoo'níił nidi ats'íístah di doodago hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di t'ááłáhági áhoot'é.
Use in a sentence (English): You sweat when it is hot and shiver when it is cold because of homeostasis. This is your body's way of staying at a constant temperature.

Biological definition in english: Similarity of DNA or RNA sequences, proteins, or traits due to shared ancestry
Defintion in Diné: Iiná bitł'óól, DNA dóó RNA t'áá áłah ałkéé' danéedééhígíí, ats'íís bee haleehii proteins, éí doodago bik'ehgo ázhnoolnin dóó ájít'é yileehígíí ahedaałt'éego
Use in a sentence (English): Bees, ants, and wasps share a homologous trait of three-part bodies (abdomen, thorax, and head) because they have shared ancestry.

Biological definition in english: An individual who has two of the same alleles for a gene. Compare with heterozygote.
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii ła' biyik'ehgo náás oołchíiłii łahgo át'é silį́į́'ígíí naakigo bee hólǫ́.
Use in a sentence (English): Individuals who have two sickle cell alleles are homozygotes at that locus and will display sickle cell disease.

Biological definition in english: Chemical substances that act as messenger molecules in the body. After being made in one part of the body, they travel to other parts of the body where they help control how cells and organs do their work
Defintion in Diné: Akááz bitoo' ats'íís yee ákonízinígíí. Ats'íís biyi'di haleeh aadóó ats'íístahgóó hoo'nááł yileeh.
Literal Translation: akááz = gland, bitoo' = juice. Meaning,The juice of the gland
Use in a sentence (English): Type II diabetes is a result of being unable to regulate blood sugar levels because the body doesn't respond to a hormone called insulin correctly.

Biological definition in english: Molecules and surfaces that do interact with water
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da bizhool,  molecules, éí doodago bikáá'góó tó bił ałtah yileehígíí
