Use in a sentence (English): Salt is hydrophilic; it is easily dissolved when it is mixed with water.

Biological definition in english: Molecules and surfaces that do no interact with water
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da bizhool,  molecules, éí doodago bikáá'góó tó doo bił ałtah yileehígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Oil is hydrophobic; it will not dissolve when mixed with water.

Biological definition in english: A testable statement that explains a set of observations.
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é haalzíidgo haa da yit'ée doogo dóó bídí'nóol'ąął bohónéedzą́ baa ha'oodzíí'ígíí
Use in a sentence (English): You think bees prefer sunny days over cloudy days because it is unlikely to rain on sunny days.  You test your hypothesis by comparing the number of bees visiting flowers on both sunny and cloudy days.

Biological definition in english: The movement of individuals into a particular population or area from other populations or areas. Compare with emigration.
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii tádínéehgo bíla'ashdla'ii bił haz'ą́ągo yitah yinééh éí doodago nááná łahgi haz'ą́ągi niinééhgo
Use in a sentence (English): When you get a cut it is important to wash it with soap and water so you do not get an infection.

Biological definition in english: A collection of cells and organs that help to defend an organism against pathogens.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí dóó akááz éí doodago atsą́ siléí bitoo' t'áádoole'é ba'át'e' dahólóonii yich'ą́ą́h naalnishígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Someone who has the flu is infectious for the first couple of days because they can give the flu to others.

Biological definition in english: A single, separate organism distinguished from others of the same kind
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii t'ááła' dahyikahígíí t'ááłá'ígo
Use in a sentence (English): Type II diabetes is a result of being unable to regulate blood sugar levels because the body doesn't respond to a hormone called insulin correctly.

Biological definition in english: An illness caused by a pathogen, such as a virus, bacteria, or parasite.
Defintion in Diné: Ba'át'e' hólóonii (pathogen) bits'ą́ą́dóó ii'noot'į́į́' doodago łóód haleehgo doo ákójít'ée da jileehígíí: naałniih (virus), ch'osh doo yit'íinii, éí doodago yaa' ádaat'éii.
Use in a sentence (English): Our immune system is made up of white blood cells and tissues like our skin which can protect us from bacterial and viral infections

Biological definition in english: The process of passing on illness or disease.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís yihodiiłt'hii dóó yąąh dahooł'aahii idahidilnéehgo
Use in a sentence (English): One individual corn plant will produce between two and four ears of corn.

Biological definition in english: To receive a particular characteristic from a parent, usually through genes that are passed from parent to offspring.
Defintion in Diné: Hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii binahjį' yee hadít'éhígíí bił ho'dizhchį́įgo
Literal Translation: bił oochíiłii = birth. hazhdiidzaa = dress up. Describing " how you look as an offspring of your parents"
Use in a sentence (English): When somone notices that siblings look alike, they are seeing similar traits that the siblings inherited from their parents.

Biological definition in english: Made of non-living materials. Compare with organic.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da doo dahináa dago daholónígíí bee ályaa. Hináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́'go éí organic át'ée doo.
Literal Translation: doo = no. hináanii = living. Meaning, not living
Use in a sentence (English): Inorganic substances like metal and turquoise can be used to make a turquoise bracelet.

Biological definition in english: Small animals with six legs and a hard outer shell called an exoskeleton.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ch'osh bidi'nínígíí éí hastą́ą́ bijáád dóó bits'a' dahólǫ́ǫgo yee bits'íís niłdzil éí exoskeleton wolyé.
Literal Translation: ch'osh = bug
Use in a sentence (English): A ladybug is an insect because it has six legs and an outer shell; however, a tick is not an insect because it does not have six legs.

Biological definition in english: An inherited behavior by animals that is not learned
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináanii áát'įįłígíí t'áá bíni' dóó bintsékees át'éego bił yizhchį́, doo t'áá bí yíhooł'ą́ą' da.
Use in a sentence (English): Building a nest is an instinct; birds know how to build nests without being taught.

Biological definition in english: Located or occuring between or among cells. Compare with intracellular.
Literal Translation: between cells
Use in a sentence (English): If the rooms of your house are cells, the hallways between the rooms are like intercellular space.

Biological definition in english: The period of time when a cell grows and copies of DNA are made.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz dínéesą́ą́dóó biyi'di iiná bitł'óól bééda'alne' silį́į'jį
Literal Translation: cell in period of rest
Use in a sentence (English): Cells spend most of their time in interphase, before making preparations to divide.

Biological definition in english: Located or occurring within a cell or cells. Compare with intercellular.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááts'ózí bita'góó
Literal Translation: between cells
Use in a sentence (English): If the rooms of your house are cells, the hallways between the rooms are like intercellular space.

Biological definition in english: A species that was introduced to an ecosystem that was not there before and that causes hardship to other organisms Haa
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da t'áá íídą́ą́' yá'át'éehgo haz'ą́ągo hináanii nááná łahdę́ę́' yikahgo yah ee'nil nít'ę́ę́' ákwe'é dahinánígíí dóó haz'ánígíí yich'į' nidahwiilná silį́įgo
Literal Translation: living thing that causes problems
Use in a sentence (English): Russian olive trees and buffelgrass are invasive species that outcompete native species and negatively affect of the environment.

Biological definition in english: Any animal lacking a spinal cord (also known as a backbone). Compare with vertebrate.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bíígháán ádaadinígíí.
Literal Translation: those that do not have a spine
Use in a sentence (English): Worms, bees, and snails are all invertebrates.

Biological definition in english: Atom or molecule with an electric charge
Defintion in Diné: Atom atsiniltł'ish bąąh hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): A neutral atom has equal amounts of positive and negative charges, but an atom that becomes more positively or negatively charged is an ion.

Biological definition in english: A place for science experiments, teaching, or the making of medicine or chemicals
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da haz'ą́ągo ákone' éé'deetįįh biniyé nida'alkaah, nida'nitin, éí doodago azee' dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ béésh da, tó da, níłch'i da ałtah ádaalne'go bee t'áadoole'é ádaalne'
Use in a sentence (English): Any space set aside for performing science experiments is a laboratory. This could even include your own backyard.

Biological definition in english: Any organic material that does not dissolve in water but will dissolve in organic materials.  They are often used to make cell membranes.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' dahólónígíí doo tó bee nídí'eełii ákondi t'áá yił ahedaałt'éhígíí éí yee nídí'eeł. Bee hinááhts'ózí bik'ésti'ígíí nidahaleeh.
Use in a sentence (English): Butter, lard, and oil are examples of lipids, which make up our cell membranes.

Biological definition in english: Vertebrate animals that have hair or fur, produce milk, and often give birth to live offspring.
Literal Translation: living things that have a spine
Use in a sentence (English): Mammals live in a variety of different environments. For example, horses run on land, whales swim in the ocean, and bats fly through the sky.

Biological definition in english: Extinction of a large number of species within a short period of time
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ła' dahyikah nít'ę́ę́' t'áa hodina'í noonééł
Use in a sentence (English): Mammals live in a variety of different environments. For example, horses run on land, whales swim in the ocean, and bats fly through the sky.

Biological definition in english: Any substance that has mass and takes up space.
Use in a sentence (English): A flashlight, a stove, and a cow are all made of matter.  However, the light from a flashlight, the heat from a stove, and the sound of a cow are not types of matter.  These are all forms of energy.

Biological definition in english: When a single cell divides twice to produce four cells containing half the original amount of genetic information. This is how gametes are made.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí naakidi ałts'ánízéehgo dį́į́' yileeh. T'áá dį́į'go bik'ehgo náás oochííł bibee haz'áanii t'áá ałní'ídóó dabiyi' yileeh. Díí ak'eelyéí bee i'niitsąąhii haleeh.
Use in a sentence (English): Scientists are concerned that climate change could cause a mass extinction event, similar to the one that occurred after the last Ice Age.

Biological definition in english: The chemical reactions in the body's cells that change food into energy.
Use in a sentence (English): Your body's metabolism is influenced by the food you eat, your age, and how much you exercise.

Diné word: hinááhts'ózí ałts'á níséego iiná bitł'óól ałkéé' niikah
Biological definition in english: The time during mitosis or meiosis where copies of chromosomes line up in the center of a cell
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí t'ááłáhádi éí doodago naakidi ałts'áníséego iiná bitł'óól ałníi'gi hasht'e' niikáahgo hodinaahígíí.

Biological definition in english: An organism too small to be seen without a microscope
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii doo yit'íinii. Bee adéest'į́į́' dabidziilígíí t'éí bee daat'į́.
Literal Translation: bug so small that you can't see them
Use in a sentence (English): Sperm and egg cells are created through meiosis.

Biological definition in english: A device that makes very small objects or organisms larger so that they can be observed
Defintion in Diné: Bee adéest'į́į́' ha'át'íi da áłts'íísígo doo yit'į́į da nidi nitsaago daat'į́įgo ádeile'
Literal Translation: something used to look at very small objects that cannot be seen
Use in a sentence (English): You need a microscope to see cells dividing.

Biological definition in english: The movement of individuals in and out of a population or area
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii kéédahat'į́įgi yah ahekááh dóó ch'éédahakááh.
Use in a sentence (English): To find food, geese migrate to the north during the summer and migrate back to the south during the winter.

Biological definition in english: When one organism looks, sounds, or behaves like another species.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hináanii nááná ła' hináanii yenoolnin, biinéé' yił aheełt'é, éí doodago yeel'į́įgo naaghá.
Use in a sentence (English): Stick insects use mimicry to trick predators into thinking they are twigs.

Biological definition in english: An inorganic substance that occurs naturally
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán biyi'dę́ę́' t'áádoole'é doo dahináanii bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Precious stones like onyx and turquiose are minerals.

Biological definition in english: An organelle that takes in nutrients, breaks them down, and creates energy (ATP) for the cell
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí bitsą́ siléí ch'iyáán néidił'eeł dóó yee bidziil dóó biinéí yileehígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Power plants supply electricity to your home, just like the mitochondria supplies energy to the cell.

Biological definition in english: When a single cell divides into two identical cells
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí t'ááłá'í si'ánígíí ałts'á níséehgo naaki yileehígíí
Use in a sentence (English): As we grow, our cells divide through mitosis to create new cells.

Biological definition in english: Two or more atoms that are joined because they share electrons
Defintion in Diné: Atom naaki éí doodago díkwíi da ahidiilyáago binitsiniltł'ish bináhaazléí (electrons) ahiidiinił
Use in a sentence (English): Water is a molecule because it is made when two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom combine together.

Biological definition in english: Organisms that consist of more than one cell. Compare with unicellular.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'íís hinááhts'ózí łą́ągo yee hadít'éhígíí. Ła'éí hinááhts'ózí t'ááłá'ígo bits'íís nilį́.
Use in a sentence (English): Horses, mushrooms, and cacti are multicellular organisms because they are made of many cells.

Biological definition in english: A permanent alteration in the DNA sequence
Defintion in Diné: Iiná bitł'óól łahgo ádzaa.
Use in a sentence (English): Mutations are common.  Every person has a lot of mutations, but most of them are not harmful.

Biological definition in english: Association between organisms of two different species in which each benefits
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii doo t'ááła' nilį́į da nidi ahíłká aná'ahinilchxéehgo
Use in a sentence (English): A mutualism occurs between people and the bacteria that live in our intestines.  The bacteria gain nutrients while they help us digest food.

Biological definition in english: The process where organisms with the highest fitness in an environment survive and reproduce and their phenotypes become more common in the next generation. At the same time, organisms with the lowest fitness fail to survive or reproduce less and their phenotypes become less common in the next generation.
Defintion in Diné: Hoolzhishgo ał'ąą ánáhoo'níiłgo hináanii yídaníłdzilígíí náás yikah dóó oołchíiłgo bits'íís hadidzaaígíí ayóo yit'į́. Łahgo át'éego éí hináanii bił áhoot'éhígíí doo yíníłdzilgóó éí t'óó áádįįł dóó bits'íís doo łahgo áániił da doo.
Use in a sentence (English): Natural selection will favor desert mice with light fur because they are less likely to be seen by predators.

Biological definition in english: When the outcome of a process reduces further change and the process becomes stable
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da naalnishgo hoolzhish nít'ę́ę́' ni'áániił silį́į́' dóó bits'ą́ą́dóó doo łahgo áhooniił da yileeh éí náasdi hasht'e didooteeł
Use in a sentence (English): The thermostat functions as a negative feedback loop because it keeps the temperature within a building stable by turning on the air conditioning if the temperature gets too hot or turning it off if it gets too cold.

Biological definition in english: When the outcome of a process reduces further change and the process becomes stable
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da naalnishgo hoolzhish nít'ę́ę́' ni'áániił silį́į́' dóó bits'ą́ą́dóó doo łahgo áhooniił da yileeh éí náasdi hasht'e didooteeł
Use in a sentence (English): When you get near a hot stove, your skin sends signals to your brain through your nerves to warn you to move away.

Biological definition in english: Nerves are a collection of neurons that carry signals throughout the body
Defintion in Diné: Ats'óóz t'áá łá'í nít'i'ígíí ats'íístahdi łą́ągo ahidadiit'i'go ats'íís yee ákonízin
Literal Translation: nerve
Use in a sentence (English): Parkinson's disease is a disorder of the nervous system that occurs when neurons start to die, which affects the body's movement

Biological definition in english: The brain, spinal cord, and nerves of an animal that together receive messages from other parts of the body and control how the body functions
Defintion in Diné: Atsiighąą', atsiighąą' íígháán bii'nít'i'ígíí dóó ats'óóz t'áá ałtso hináanii bits'íís yee hadít'éhígíí ats'íístahgóó da'ahi'niihgo ats'íís hiná.
Use in a sentence (English): Each of your fingertips has over 3,000 neurons which send signals to your brain about the things you touch or feel.

Biological definition in english: Cells that carry electrical charges through the body and are part of the nervous system. Also known as a nerve cell.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'óóz t'áá łá'í nít'i'ígíí bitsiniltł'ish bąąhgóó hólǫ́. Nerve cell ałdó' deiłní.
Use in a sentence (English): Neutrons have the same weight as protons but have no charge. Together with protons, they form the nucleus of the atom and determine its weight.

Biological definition in english: The components of an atom that have no charge
Defintion in Diné: Atom yee hadít'éhígíí atsiniltł'ish bąąhgóó ádin.
Literal Translation: bitsiniltł'ish = charge. ádin = none. "Meaning, no charge"
Use in a sentence (English): The nitrogen cycle describes the way nitrogen atoms move around the Earth.  Nitrogen atoms move around when organisms decompose, when bacteria absorb and release nitrogen, and when fertilizer used on crops washes into rivers and streams.

Biological definition in english: The movement of nitrogen through living organisms, the atmosphere, and the ground.
Defintion in Diné: Níłch'i t'óó ahayóijį' t'áádoole'é dabitah nahasdzáán bikáagi, nahasdzáán biyi'góó, hót'áahdi níłch'i biyi'góó, dóó dahinánígíí bitahgóó ahéénílį́.
Use in a sentence (English): The order of nucleotides in a strand of DNA and RNA determines the protein produced.

Biological definition in english: The building blocks of the RNA and DNA, also known as 'bases'. The symbols for the four bases are A, T, G, and C.
Defintion in Diné: Iiná bitł'óól, DNA dóó RNA bee haleehígíí (base deiłníigo hináanii bee hodooleełígíí)
Use in a sentence (English): The nucleus of an oxygen atom contains 8 protons and 8 neutrons.

Biological definition in english: The central part of an atom that includes the protons and neutrons.
Use in a sentence (English): The nucleus of an oxygen atom contains 8 protons and 8 neutrons.

Biological definition in english: The part of the cell that controls the functions of the cell and where DNA is found within a plasma membrane
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz yee naalnishgo biyi'di iiná bitł'óól ak'ah bineestiin, plasma. bik'í da'asti'go daholǫ́.
Literal Translation: hinááhts'ózí = cell. bijéí = heart. "Meaning, heart of the cell"
Use in a sentence (English): Most cells of organisms that are eukaryotes have a nucleus in their cells.  In animals, red blood cells do not have a nucleus.

Biological definition in english: A substance that is needed for healthy growth, development, and function
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ yidą́ągo bee na'nise', bee anoosééł, dóó binahjį' naanish ła' yit'ínígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Foods like vegetables and meats are high in nutrients and will help you grow.  Foods like potato chips and candy provide few nutrients to help sustain your body.

Biological definition in english: The data measured or seen, often during an experiment
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaahgo bééhózin silį́į'ii anáá' bee yitį́įgo haalzíídígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): You are making an observation when you feel a change in the weather, see a cloudy sky, or hear thunder.

Literal Translation: look at it

Biological definition in english: An animal that eats both plants and animals
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ch'il dóó hináanii naaldeehígíí bich'iiyą' áyósinígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): People are ominvores because we can eat both meat and vegetables.

Biological definition in english: A group of tissues in the body that has a specific form and function
Defintion in Diné: Atsą́siléí t'áá ał'ąą át'éego binaanish dahólónígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Your eyes are organs that help you see, while your heart is an organ that helps circuluate your blood throughout your body.

Biological definition in english: A structure within a cell that is enclosed within its own membrane and has a function
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz/ats'íís bitł'óól biyi'di si'ą́ągo bik'ésti'ii hólǫ́ áádóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ binaanish.
Use in a sentence (English): Organelles in a cell are like organs in a body.  Cell organelles include the nucleus and mitochondria.

Biological definition in english: Made of or made by living organisms. Compare with inorganic.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'ą́ą́dóó hazlį́į́'ígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Organic substances like wood and animal hides can be used to make a drum.

Biological definition in english: A living thing
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii
Literal Translation: A living thing
Use in a sentence (English): Animals, fungi, bacteria, and plants are all examples of organisms.

Biological definition in english: A chemical element that is essential for life on earth
Defintion in Diné: Níłch'i hót'ááhgóó hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Oxygen is a part of the air that we breathe and the water that we drink.

Biological definition in english: An organism that lives on or in another organism (its host).
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é hináago nááná łahjį' hináanii choyooł'į́įgo yee hinánígíí.
Literal Translation: lice (refering to their parasitic nature)
Use in a sentence (English): You could get a parasite like a tapeworm in your gut when you eat undercooked meat from infected animals.

Biological definition in english: The practice of living as a parasite in or on another organism
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii nááná ła' choo'į́įgo bee jiináago.
Use in a sentence (English): After they hatch from eggs, ticks survive through parasitsm where they eat blood from mammals.

Biological definition in english: A microorganism that causes, or can cause, disease or harm in the organism it lives in or on (its host)
Defintion in Diné: Naałniih éí doodago ch'osh doo yit'íinii ba'át'e' hólǫ́ǫgo ats'íís biyi'di yihodiiłt'ihii.
Use in a sentence (English): The pathogen COVID-19 affects your lungs which can give you a fever and make it hard to breathe.

Biological definition in english: A drawing that shows how ancestors and descendents are related
Defintion in Diné: Náás oochííł, bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' oodáał ii naaltsoos bikáá' naashch'ąą'
Use in a sentence (English): You can track the pedigree of a horse if you know who the parents and grandparents were.  This information lets you keep your horses from interbreeding.

Diné word: ats'íís silį́į' yit'į́ dóó bí'neel'ąąh bíighah
Biological definition in english: A trait of an individual that can be observed or measured
Defintion in Diné: Bíla'ashdla'ii hazlį́į'go ánoolnin dóó át'éegi yit'į́įgo dóó bí'neel'ąąh bihónéedzą́ągo.
Use in a sentence (English): Your hair color is an example of your phenotype.

Diné word: ch'il dootł'izhí dóó dahinánii shá yee biinéí
Biological definition in english: The process by which green plants and certain other organisms turns energy from the sun into chemical energy
Defintion in Diné: Ch'il, nanise', dóó dahináanii ła' shánídíín yee bidziil dóó biinéígo áyósinígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): When plants photosynthesize, they absorb carbon dioxide and release oxygen that we can breathe.

Biological definition in english: How an organism's body functions or the scientific study of how organisms function
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bits'íís naalnishígíí éí doodago na'alkaahk'ehgo dahináanii bits'íís naalnishígíí bíhoo'aah.
Use in a sentence (English): You are studying physiology when you study how blood moves through the heart or nutrients move through a plant.

Biological definition in english: The species that appear first in a habitat or after a disturbance.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii alą́ąjį' dahóóchxǫ'góne' adahanééhígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): After a forest fire, the first species to reappear is a pioneer species.

Biological definition in english: An organism capable of photosynthesis
Defintion in Diné: Nanise' ałtsaas'éí dóó ch'il shánídíín yee bidziilgo á'dólzingo hinánígíí.
Literal Translation: plant
Use in a sentence (English): Plants live in a variety of different environments. For example, pecan trees grow where it's warm, seaweed grow in the ocean, and piñon trees grow in or near the desert.

Biological definition in english: The non-cellular portion of blood
Defintion in Diné: Dił litsooí
Use in a sentence (English): Plasma makes up about half of our blood and has important salts, proteins, and antibodies that help fight infection.

Biological definition in english: A network of lipids and proteins that forms the boundary between the inside of an organelle and the rest of the space within the cell.
Defintion in Diné: Ak'ah bineestiin dóó protein naneesdizgo akágí nilį́įgo t'áádoole'é bikí daasti'
Use in a sentence (English): The plasma membrane is like the "skin" of organelles like mitochondria.  It separates the inside of the organelle from the surrounding environment.

Biological definition in english: The introduction of harmful materials into the environment. These harmful materials are called pollutants.
Defintion in Diné: T'áádoole'é bááhádzidii tł'óó'di nahaz'ą́ą́góó yahiigeehgo. Díí bááhádzidii pollutants wolyé.
Use in a sentence (English): Car exhaust is a type of pollution that can cause lung damage when animals breathe it in.

Biological definition in english: A group of individuals of the same species living and reproducing within a given area
Defintion in Diné: T'ááłáhági haz'ą́ągi bíla'ashdla'ii éí doodago dahináanii t'áá ahedaałt'éhígíí kééhat'į́ dóó da'ahéelchííh
Use in a sentence (English): The people in your town, the pine trees in a forest, and the trout in a lake are examples of populations.

Biological definition in english: The number of individuals of the same species living within a given area
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii kééhat'į́įgi haadahoníłtsogo hahoodzogo bii' haashį́į́ néelt'e' naaldeehígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): Albuquerque has a higher population density than Window Rock.  About 3,000 people live in each square mile within Albuquerque while Window Rock has 589 people per square mile.

Biological definition in english: When the outcome of a process causes further change and the process increases or decreases
Defintion in Diné: Ha'átíi da álnéehgo bil hoolzhishgo álnééhígíí náás áániił éí doodago ni'áániił silį́į́'
Use in a sentence (English): Climate change is accelerating because of a positive feedback loop.  Increased carbon dioxide concentrations cause global temperatures to rise. As oceans warm, they can't absorb as much carbon dioxide, which further warms the climate.

Biological definition in english: The killing and eating of one organism (the prey) by another (the predator)
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii dahináanii nááná ła' neitseed dóó yiyą́ągo.
Use in a sentence (English): Predation occurs when a lizard eats a fly, a cat eats a mouse, or a bear eats a fish.

Biological definition in english: An organism that lives mostly by killing and eating other animals
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii hináanii náánáła' neiłtseed dóó yiyą́ąyee hiná
Use in a sentence (English): Mountain lions are predators because they must hunt other animals to survive.

Biological definition in english: The period of time in which an unborn offspring is carried within the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ootsą́; I'niitsąąd dóó awéé' hazlį́į'jį'
Literal Translation: pregnant
Use in a sentence (English): In African elephants, pregnancy can last up to 22 months while pregnancy in cats is about 9 weeks.

Biological definition in english: An organism that is hunted or caught for food, usually by a predator.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii nááná łahdę́ę́' hináanii nida'ałtseedii chodabooł'ínígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Deer are prey for many animals including mountain lions and people.

Biological definition in english: The chance that something will happen or of a hypothesis being correct
Defintion in Diné: Haa da hoot'éedoo le' hasingo éí doodago na'alkaahgo naalkaahii ádoonííł nawólnínígíí
Use in a sentence (English): When you role a six-sided die, the probability of rolling a three is 1/6, or 16.7%.

Biological definition in english: Organisms that are capable of photosynthesis and are the basis of a food chain. Also called primary producer.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii shánídíín choyooł'į́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziil dahólǫ́ éí ts'ídá binahjį' ch'iyáán nihwiileeh
Use in a sentence (English): A common food chain in a field includes grass, which are producers that can be eaten by grasshoppers, which then can be eaten by other animals.

Biological definition in english: A unicellular organism that does not have a nucleus and has few organelles.  Compare with eukaryote.
Defintion in Diné: Ha'át'íi da hinááts'óóz t'ááła'í si'ą́ągo bits'íís nilį́įgo biyi'di bijéí, nucleus doo hólǫ́ǫ da
Use in a sentence (English): The bacteria in your gut are prokaryotes that help you digest food and defend against pathogens.

Biological definition in english: The first stage of mitosis or meiosis where chromosomes are compressed
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz ał'ąą át'éego ałts'á níséego, mitosis éí doodago meiosis, alą́ąjį' bee hahalzhííshígíí

Biological definition in english: A chain of amino acids that can fold into a specific shape
Defintion in Diné: Ch'iyáán ats'íís bee haleeh dóó hasht'éé yoodlííłígíí, protein, bee haleehígíí, amino acid, da'ahólzha' daaleeh dóó nidaat'ood łeh
Use in a sentence (English): Hemoglobin is the protein in a red blood cell that carries oxygen to different parts of your body.

Biological definition in english: The components of an atom that have a positive charge
Defintion in Diné: Atoms yee hadit'éhígíí biniltł'ish shábik'ehgo, clockwise or consistent with the sun's path, siláhígíí bąąh hólǫ́
Literal Translation: bitsiniltł'ish = charge of the atom. shá bik'ehgo = path of the sun (meanig clockwise). siláii = laid down. Meaning "atom with a charge laid clockwise"
Use in a sentence (English): The number of protons an atom has is its atomic number.  A nitrogen atom has 7 protons while an oxygen atom has 8 protons.

Biological definition in english: A square drawing used to show the different genotypes possible in the offspring when two individuals reproduce
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii ał'ąą ádaat'éego bee hazhdít'éhígíí naasch'ąą'go ál'įįhígíí. Dik'ą́ągo si'ą́ą łeh.
Use in a sentence (English): By drawing a punnet square, doctors can easily show new parents what blood types their children could have.

Biological definition in english: The allele that only determines the phenotype when the organism has two copies of it. Compare with dominant.
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii łahgo át'é silį́į́'ígíí, allele, akéédóó naalnishgo bik'ehgo ats'íís haidiił'įįh béé'ályaago naaki hwee hólónígíí.
Use in a sentence (English): You have two copies of each chromosome.  Sometimes there is a recessive allele on one chromosome and a dominant allele on the other.  The recessive allele is the one that will not influence the phenotype.

Biological definition in english: An inherited characteristic that appears in an offspring if it is received from a parent through a recessive allele. Compare with dominant trait.
Defintion in Diné: Hats'íís dóó ájít'éhígíí bił ho'dizhchínígíí hamá dóó hazhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' nízhdiiláhígíí éí bik'ehgo náás oochíił'ii akéédóó naalnishígíí, recessive, bik'ehgo hojizhlį́į́'.
Use in a sentence (English): A recessive trait is determined by a recessive allele. For example, if you have an allele for light eyes and an allele for dark eyes you will have dark eyes because the allele for light eyes is recessive.

Biological definition in english: The blood cells that carry oxygen
Defintion in Diné: Hadił łichí'í níłch'i'
Literal Translation: dił = red. łichí'í = red.
Use in a sentence (English): Anemia occurs when someone doesn't have enough red blood cells.  It can cause people to feel tired, dizzy, or short of breath.

Biological definition in english: The situation where closely related species are unable to reproduce because of differences in location, mating time, behavior, or changes in anatomy.
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da ha'át'íi da dahináanii t'ááłáhági bił haz'ą́ą doo nida'iiłchíigo hodeeshzhiizh
Use in a sentence (English): Two populations of squirels on opposite sides of the Grand Canyon experienced reproductive isolation for so long that they are now two different species.

Biological definition in english: The group of organs involved in reproduction
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís biyi'di bee idínótsąął dóó adoochííł biniyé dahólónígíí
Literal Translation: oochííł = reprodutive. bá siláii = laid down. Meaning "reproductive tract"
Use in a sentence (English): The reason that female animals get pregnant is because their reporductive system has specialized organs for carrying offspring.

Biological definition in english: The creation of new knowledge or the use of existing knowledge in a new way so as to create new concepts, methods, and understandings
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaah bee éé'deetánígíí náás hideesnilgo íhoo'aah bínááhiniidééh
Literal Translation: naʼałkaah=investigating/research
Use in a sentence (English): Decades of scientific research on vaccine ingredients and side effects has shown that vaccines do not cause autism.

Biological definition in english: The ability of an organism to withstand harmful effects
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naayéé' doo bidééłníi da á'dólzin
Use in a sentence (English): Animals with thick fur have a resistance to cold temperatures.

Biological definition in english: The group of organs involved in the exchange of gas between an organism and the environment to make energy (respiration).
Defintion in Diné: Atsą́ siléí internal organs ła' ats'íís biyi'di dóó ats'íís binaadę́ę́' níłch'I ałnánáálį́įgo yee biinéí dóó bidziilgo ábósin
Use in a sentence (English): In vertebrates, the lungs are an important part of respiratory system as they bring oxygen into the body when we breathe in, and release carbon dioxide when we breathe out.

Biological definition in english: A way for scientists to study and learn things. In the first step, a problem is identified, then a hypothesis is made from existing information, and then the hypothesis is tested with an experiment.
Defintion in Diné: Ałkéé' honí'ą́ągo na'alkaah bee doo naaki nilį́į́góó éé'deetį́į́h dóó íhoo'aah. I'diił'áii bééhózingo ál'įįh, át'éedoo dóó nídleeł baa nitáháskéezgo saad ál'įįh, díí baa nitsáháskéézígíí naalkaah,
Use in a sentence (English): Scientists have hypothesized that plants can absorb metal contamination. Following the scientific method, they conducted an experiment to test their hypothesis and observed that metal contaminants can be found in plant tissues.

Biological definition in english: People who discover new things and research how things work. They observe, measure, and communicate results
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaah yeda'aniihgo éé'deetįįh yinidaalnish dóó t'áá ha'át'ííshį́į́ hiná éí doodago naalnishgi át'áo yéé'dítį́į́h. Hada'asííd, ída'neeł'ąąh, dóó bił bééhoozinígíí yaa dahalne'.
Literal Translation: Naʼałkaahíí=thing that does the investigating "Reseacher" . naʼałkaah=research, the íí is what makes it describing.
Use in a sentence (English): Not all scientists work in a lab.  Anyone who uses observations and research to answer a question is a scientist. That can even include you!

Biological definition in english: A gene that is located on a sex chromosome
Defintion in Diné: Bik'ehgo náás oochíiłii iiná bitł'óól ałk'ídeesdizígíí, chromosome, bee at'ééd éí doodago ashkii jileehígíí bąąhgi hólónígíí
Use in a sentence (English): Humans have two sex chromosomes called X and Y.  The genes that cause red-green color blindness are sex-linked genes because are passed down on the X chromosome.  Males inherit only one X chromosome, and all alleles on that chromosome act as dominant alleles.  This is why red-green color blindness is more common in men.

Biological definition in english: The combination of different gametes to form unique offspring that are genetically different from their parents.
Defintion in Diné: Bee idí'nóotsąął amá dóó azhé'é bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' ahidii'ashgo bee t'áá sahdii ázhnoolningo dóó ájít'éego hojileehígíí
Literal Translation: reproduction
Use in a sentence (English): When a male and a female lizard mate, they produce offspring by sexual reproduction.

Biological definition in english: The internal hard structure that supports the body of a living thing
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís biyi'di nitł'izgo ats'íís bá naaz'á éí ats'íís yee sizį́ dóó naha'ná
Literal Translation: ats'íís = living. ts'ïn = bone. "bones of a living thing"
Use in a sentence (English): Without a skeleton, our body would have no shape and we would be unable to move in a coordinated way.  We would look like a pile of organs.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nihits'íístsin doo hólǫ́ǫ dago éí doo nahii'náa da doo dóó doo siidzį́į da doo, t'áá nihits'íís t'ááłáhági yanáa'áa doo.

Biological definition in english: An organ that forms the outer protective layer of the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís yee hadít'éii, organ, ats'íís bik'ésti'ígíí
Literal Translation: akágí= skin (you modify the a depending what you're talking about)
Use in a sentence (English): Our skin protects our organs from the environment by blocking moisture, preventing heat loss, and protecting us from pathogens.   Repeated sun exposure is a major cause of skin cancer.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nihikágí éí nihitsą́ siléii bich'ą́ą́h hólǫ́ áko doo tł'óó'dę́ę́' tó baa shidoogish da, áádóó bee nihits'íís sidooígíí dóó ch'ísheegéesh da, dóó naałniih nihihodidoołt'ihii bich'ą́ą́h hólǫ́. Shá áłahjį' bii' nijigháago hakágí tídít'įįhgo ba'át'e' haleeh.

Biological definition in english: Light, heat, and other kinds of energy given off by the Sun
Defintion in Diné: Shá, jį́honaa'éí, bits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' adinídíín, bits'áníłdoii, dóó bits'áshígishii
Use in a sentence (English): The function of solar panels are to capture solar energy and convert it to a usable electricity.

Biological definition in english: A species that requires specific environmental conditions or specific types of resources. Compare with generalist.
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii t'ááła' dahyikahgo ts'ídá bá yá'áhoot'éehgo haz'ą́ągi yee hináanii bá hólǫ́ǫgo t'éí náás yikah
Use in a sentence (English): Yucca plants are specialists that are only pollinated by specific species of moths. These moths are also specialists because they can only lay their eggs in yucca flowers.

Biological definition in english: A group of organisms that can reproduce with one another and produce fertile offspring
Defintion in Diné: Dahináanii t'ááłá'í danilį́įgo ałhá nida'iiłchíigo noosééł
Use in a sentence (English): All dogs are the same species, but a dog and a cat are different species because they cannot mate and produce offspring together.

Biological definition in english: The male sex cell, or gamete in animals.  Compare with egg.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii biką'ígíí bik'eelyéí. Dabi'áádígíí ałdó' bik'eelyéí hólǫ́, biyeezhii (egg) deiłní.
Literal Translation: male substance for reproduction
Use in a sentence (English): In many species, males pass on their DNA to their offspring through their sperm cells.

Literal Translation: male semen
Use in a sentence (English): Car accidents are the leading cause of injuries to the spinal cord. If damaged, the spinal cord cannot repair itself.  This is why it is important to wear your seatbelt.

Biological definition in english: Structure that begins at the the brain and continues down the spine and carries messages between the brain and the rest of the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís yee hadít'éii atsiighąą' bits'ánít'i' dóó bíígháán bii' nít'i'go ats'iighąą' dóó ats'íístahgó áhoot'éii yił ééhósin
Literal Translation: brain material going through the spine
Use in a sentence (English): Starch is found in corn, potatoes, rice, and pasta.  When you eat these foods, the starch is broken down into sugar.

Biological definition in english: The main form of stored carbohydrates in plants.
Defintion in Diné: Nanise' ałtaas'éí łikání bii' hólónígíí
Literal Translation: sweet substance hidden/stored in plants
Use in a sentence (English): Traditional buffalo hunting was once a sustainable hunting method because hunting buffalo did not negatively affect their population.

Biological definition in english: When a resource from the environment is not used faster than it is produced in nature.
Defintion in Diné: Nahasdzáán bikáá' honí'ą́ą́góó ha'át'ííshį́į́ chodaa'ínígíí nihwiileehígíí doo bilááhgóó choo'į́į da
Literal Translation: careful use of resource
Use in a sentence (English): We have a symbiosis with the bacteria that live in our gut. Our stomach and intestines give these bacteria a place to live and food to eat. In turn, the bacteria help us digest our food and protect us from pathogens in our food.

Biological definition in english: Any longǫterm physical relationship between individuals of two different species, including mutualism and parasitism.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii doo t'ááła' nilį́į da nidi ałch'ishdę́ę́' ahee hidi'ná
Literal Translation: living by means of each other
Use in a sentence (English): Scientists who study taxonomy found that whales are more closely related to animals on land (including humans) than they are to fish.

Biological definition in english: The science of naming and describing organisms.
Defintion in Diné: Na'alkaahk'ehgo t'áá ałtsoní bízhi' dóó íiyisíí át'éhígíí baa hane'
Literal Translation: giving names to things
Use in a sentence (English): A wolf pack has a large territory of up to 1000 square miles that it defends from other wolves.  If let outside, a house cat will defend a small territory of less than 10 square miles and will kill both pests and beneficial wildlife.

Biological definition in english: The last stage of mitosis or meiosis in which chromosomes move to opposite ends of the cell and two nucleus are formed.
Literal Translation: cell/body cells separately they grow when

Biological definition in english: Any area defended by an organism or a group of similar organisms for their own use
Defintion in Diné: Haa'í da haz'ą́ągo hináanii choyooł'į́įgo yaa hóchį'gi
Literal Translation: would need to specify "who's land/area". Keya is land
Use in a sentence (English): When you boil water, the water molecules will start to move around quickly as they absorb thermal energy from the burner.

Biological definition in english: An explanation for why things work or how things happen that is supported by a large amount of scientific evidence
Defintion in Diné: T'áá ha'át'íi da át'éegi dóó naalnishígi át'éego baa hane' dóó nábinázláago binahjį' áhá'nínígíí łą́ bééhózingo
Use in a sentence (English): Cell theory states that all organisms are made up of cells and that all new cells are produced by existing cells. We know that this is true because we can see cells under a microscope and can trace the origin of new cells back to the cells they came from. There is no evidence to suggest this theory is incorrect.

Biological definition in english: This type of energy (also known as heat energy) is created when molecules move around quickly and randomly within a substance, which releases heat.
Defintion in Diné: Hado bee ayoonaałgo t'áá ha'át'íi da yee hadít'éii, molecules, ahídaha'náahgo yee niidoh dóó bits'á níłdoii
Use in a sentence (English): When you boil water, the water molecules will start to move around quickly as they absorb thermal energy from the burner.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Tó yibéezhgo tó bizhool, water molecules, kǫ' bits'áłdohígíí bee niidohgo nidaha'náago yibéézh yileeh.

Biological definition in english: A group of cells that perform a similar function
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'ózí t'áá ahedaałt'éego dóó binaanish t'ááłá'ígo
Use in a sentence (English): Gum disease causes your gum tissue to become red, swollen, and bleed easily.  You can prevent gum disease by frequently brushing and flossing your teeth.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Awóchii' bąąh dahoo'aahgo hawóchii' dadeeshchii', neezhcháád, dóó dił bąąh łeh. Awóchii' bąąh dahwiidoo'aałígíí bits'ąą t'áá ahą́ą́h hawoo' níjích'ish dóó hawoo' bita' niná'zhníłdisgo doo bąąh dahoo'aah da.

Biological definition in english: A characteristic of an organism that can be observed.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii bił bidizhchínígíí yit'į́ yileehdi
Literal Translation: the way a living thing is
Use in a sentence (English): Hair color, eye color, and nose size are all traits you inherit from your parents.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Hatsiighá ánoolninígíí, hanáá' ánoolninígíí, dóó háchį́į́h áníłtsooígíí da éí bee haho'dilyaago ho'dizhchínígii hamá dóó hazhé'é yee hadít'éhígíí bił ho'dichííhígíí óolyé.

Biological definition in english: An organism's position along a food chain
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii ayą́ągo hiná dóó áadi ha'át'ííshį́į́ bich'iiyą' nánídlį́į́góne'
Literal Translation: where a living thing becomes food
Use in a sentence (English): Plants are at the base of each food chain.  Animals that eat plants, like deer, are one trophic level above plants.  Animals that eat deer, like mountain lions, are one trophic level above deer.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nanise' ałtaas'éí ts'ídá alą́ąjį' ch'iyáán nilį́ nahasdzáán bikáa'góó ch'iyáán siláago bee hahodít'éhígíí. Hináanii naaldlooshii ádaat'éii, bįįh da, éí nanise' ałtaas'éí deiyą́ągo bikáá'gónaa bił nááhást'ą́. Dahináanii nidaaldlooshígíí bįįh deiyánígíí, násdóí da, bidéigóne' bił nááhást'ą́.

Biological definition in english: Organisms that consist of one cell. Compare with multicellular.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii hinááhts'óóz t'ááłá'ígo bits'íís nilį́. Hináanii náádaała' éí hinááhts'óóz łą́ągo yee bits'íís dahólǫ́.
Literal Translation: one cell that lives separately
Use in a sentence (English): Bacteria are unicellular organisms because they are made of one cell.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Chosh doo yit'íinii bidii'nínígíí éí doo ch'osh át'éeda nidi éí bee yíníijí. Hináago t'áá ałtsogóó hólǫ́, hinááhts'ózí t'ááłá'ígo bitsíís.

Biological definition in english: The organs that remove waste from the body.
Defintion in Diné: Ats'íís biyi'di siláhígíí ats'íís ałtso choyoos'įįdígíí níláhgóó yits'ą́ąjį' kwííł'ínígíí
Literal Translation: the place of urine
Use in a sentence (English): The urinary system is the filter of the bloodstream as it captures waste and releases it from the body.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Alizh bił haz'ą́ągi éí hadił yąąh haił'eeł éí hats'íístahdę́ę́' t'áádoole'é ałtso chodaoz'įįdígíí hats'íís yits'á yiilé.

Biological definition in english: An animal that has a spinal cord and a skeleton. Compare with invetebrate.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, bits'íísts'in dóó bitsiighąą' bíígháán bii' danít'i' ígíí
Literal Translation: those that have a spine
Use in a sentence (English): Humans, horses, and birds are vertebrates, but an octopus has no bones or spinal cord and is thus an invertebrate.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Bíla'ashdla'ii, łį́į́', dóó tsídii éí bíígháán dahólóonii ádaat'é éí bąą vertebrate wolyé, ákondi táłtł'ááh bigaanłání éí bits'íístsin ádaadingo atsiighąą' íígháán bii' nít'i'í doo dahólǫ́ǫ da. Éí bąą invertebrate wolyé.

Biological definition in english: Cells, tissues, or organs in a body that have no apparent function and is similar to a functioning organ or structure in an ancestor.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís biyi'di binaanish t'ááła'ígo hólónígíí, tissues, ats'ą́ siláii ats'íís biyi'di hólǫ́ nidi doo choo'į́į dago yits'ą́ą́dę́ę́' yigáałii bits'íís hólónígíí ła' choyooł'į́ dóó binaanish hólónígíí t'áá yił aheełt'é
Literal Translation: body
Use in a sentence (English): The wisdom teeth of our ancestors would replace any teeth that fell out or were removed.  Now, our wisdom teeth are vestigial traits because we have better mouth hygeine and dental care.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Nihizází biwózhah éí nihiwoo' t'áá háíshį́į́ haalts'idgo da, haat'ą́ągo da bits'ásk'ehgóne' anídoot'ááł. K'ad éí nihiwózhah ałk'idą́ą́' awózhah danilį́į́ nít'ę́ę́'yę́ęh bii' haniilzánígíí ádaat'é.

Biological definition in english: A small parasite that lives within the cells of other organisms, cannot reproduce without the help of the cell it lives inside of, and causes disease.
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii doo yit'į́į dago nááná łahdę́ę́' yigáałgo ats'íís bihinááhts'óóz biyi'di hiná silį́į́', dóó áadi hinááhts'óóz yee binahjį' noosééł yileeh áádóó bits'ą́ą́dóó ąąh dahaz'ą́ haleeh
Literal Translation: contagion that goes around
Use in a sentence (English): Hantavirus is a virus that causes serious lung disease. You can catch hantavirus from the saliva, urine, or droppings of deer mice and other rodents.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Na'ats'ǫǫsí binaalniih éí naałniih, virus, hajéí yilzólii doo hats'íí át'éégóó yąąh dahooł'aah. Na'ats'ǫǫsí dóó na'at'i'í bizhéé', bilizh, éí doodago bichaan bits'ą́ą́dóó hodilnah.

Biological definition in english: The movement of water on, above, or below the surface of our planet.
Defintion in Diné: Tó nahasdzáán bikáá'góó dóó biyi' hólǫ́  dóó hót'ááhgóó dahólǫ́ éí hoo'nááł dóó danílínígíí bił ahééhwiizhíísh
Literal Translation: regeneration of water
Use in a sentence (English): The water cycle describes how water moves around the earth.  Water moves around when it rains, when rivers transport it long distances, when it evaporates from the surface of leaves, or when ocean currents move it around the globe.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Tó bits'íís nineez nahazdzáán bináhaazlá neestiin dóó tózhool bee binahat'a' hideesláago bits'ą́ą́dóó níłtsą́ yee naalnishgo tooh danílį́ nízaadgóó, áádóó ááh náádleełgo dahtoo' bee hodiyin dóó tó niteel nahasdzáán bináhaazyį́.

Biological definition in english: Cells that are part of the body's immune system that help the body fight infection and other diseases.
Defintion in Diné: Hinááhts'óóz ats'íís yee bihodééłníi da áyósin éí ii'noot'į́į́', infection, dóó ąąh dahwiidooł'aałii yich'ą́ą́h naalnish
Literal Translation: dił = blood. łigaaî = white. Meaning, "white blood"
Use in a sentence (English): White blood cells are part of the immune system. There are many different types of white blood cells circulating in your blood and each type has a specific role in fighting infections.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Dił łigaí éí ats'íís bee doo bihodééłníinii yitah naalnish. Dił łigaí t'óó ahayóí ał'ąą át'é hats'óós biyi'di hadił bitah áádóó t'áá ał'ąą át'éego binaanish dahólǫ́ǫgo ch'osh doo yit'íinii ats'íís yihodiiłt'ééhígíí yik'ijį' nidaalnish.

Biological definition in english: The scientific study of animals
Defintion in Diné: Hináanii naaldeehii, animals, ał'ąą át'éego dahyikahígíí haalzííd dóó naalkaahgo bíhoo'aah
Literal Translation: naaldeehii = animal. naalkaah = study. MeaningMeaning, "study of animals"
Use in a sentence (English): Ranchers use their zoology knowledge to breed sheep so their offspring have more meat or fluffier wool.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Naaldlooshii yee dahinánígíí éí naaldeehii naalkaah bił béédahózingo bee dibé bitsį' daditánígíí da doodago bighaa' daalzhóólígíí yee nideiniłtą'.

Biological definition in english: The cell that forms after gametes are joined.
Defintion in Diné: Amá dóó azhé'é bik'eelyéí bee i'niitsąądgo
Literal Translation: baby
Use in a sentence (English): The zygote forms once the sperm cell enters the egg cell and they become one cell.  Identical twins are a result of a zygote splitting into two cells.
Use in a sentence (Diné): Awéé' iilts'ą́ą́hígíí éí hastįįh bik'eelyéígíí asdzání bik'eelyéí yinígháahgo ats'íís bitł'óól/hinááhts'óóz t'áá łá'í bits'ą́ą́dóó dahdíníisééh. Naakií éí awee' iilts'ą'ígíí naakigo ałts'á'ashgo ał'ąą noosééł yileeh.
